  <h:body>
    <group ref="/data/var">
      <label ref="jr:itext('var-label')"/>
    </group>
    <group ref="/data/grp_presence_validation_done" appearance="field-list">
      <label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done-label')"/>
      <trigger ref="/data/grp_presence_validation_done/label_already_recorded" appearance="minimal">
        <label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done/label_already_recorded-label')"/>
      </trigger>
      <trigger ref="/data/grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter" appearance="minimal">
        <label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter-label')"/>
        <alert ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter-constraintMsg')"/>
      </trigger>
    </group>
    <group ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence" appearance="field-list">
      <label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence-label')"/>
      <trigger ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t" appearance="minimal">
        <label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t-label')"/>
      </trigger>
      <trigger ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/tablea_header" appearance="minimal">
        <label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/tablea_header-label')"/>
      </trigger>
      <select1 ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche">
        <label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche-label')"/>
        <item>
          <label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche-oui-label')"/>
          <value>oui</value>
        </item>
        <item>
          <label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche-non-label')"/>
          <value>non</value>
        </item>
      </select1>
    </group>
    <group ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero" appearance="field-list">
      <label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero-label')"/>
      <trigger ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded" appearance="minimal">
        <label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded-label')"/>
      </trigger>
      <trigger ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter" appearance="minimal">
        <label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter-label')"/>
        <alert ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter-constraintMsg')"/>
      </trigger>
    </group>
    <group>
      <label ref="jr:itext('repreat_attendance-label')"/>
      <repeat jr:count="/data/var/count_attendance_caseids" jr:noAddRemove="true()" nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance">
        <group ref="/data/repreat_attendance/display"/>
      </repeat>
    </group>
    <group ref="/data/save">
      <label ref="jr:itext('save-label')"/>
    </group>
  </h:body>
</h:html>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum">
	<h:head>
		<h:title>Copy of Supprimer une Fiche de Présence</h:title>
		<model>
			<instance>
				<data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/543C457A-E8F4-4DB8-AAED-AD51ECDE5A95" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="Copy of Supprimer une Fiche de Présence">
					<informations_gographiques>
						<location_id />
						<location_type />
						<location_type_name />
					</informations_gographiques>
					<campagne_id />
					<select_attendances />
					<count_selected_attendance />
					<repeat jr:template="" ids="" count="" current_index="" vellum:role="Repeat">
						<item id="" index="" jr:template="">
							<position />
							<attendance_caseid />
							<display>
								<date_presence />
								<id_case />
								<travailleur_role_nom />
								<campagne_nom />
								<validation />
								<travailleur_infos />
								<close_attendance vellum:case_type="attendance" vellum:role="SaveToCase">
									<case xmlns="http://commcarehq.org/case/transaction/v2" case_id="" date_modified="" user_id="">
										<update>
											<raison_suppression />
										</update>
										<close />
									</case>
								</close_attendance>
							</display>
						</item>
					</repeat>
					<join_travailleur_infos />
					<label_resume />
					<confirm_suppression />
				</data>
			</instance>
			<instance src="jr://instance/session" id="commcaresession" />
			<instance src="jr://fixture/locations" id="locations" />
			<instance src="jr://fixture/item-list:campagnes_label" id="campagnes_label" />
			<instance src="jr://instance/casedb" id="casedb" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques/location_id" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques/location_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques/location_type" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques/location_type" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@type" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques/location_type_name" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques/location_type_name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/location_type" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/campagne_id" nodeset="/data/campagne_id" required="true()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/select_attendances" nodeset="/data/select_attendances" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/count_selected_attendance" nodeset="/data/count_selected_attendance" vellum:calculate="count-selected(#form/select_attendances)" calculate="count-selected(/data/select_attendances)" />

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/repeat/item/attendance_caseid" nodeset="/data/repeat/item/attendance_caseid" vellum:calculate="cond((#form/repeat/item/position + 1) <= #form/count_selected_attendance, selected-at(#form/select_attendances, #form/repeat/item/position), '')" calculate="cond((/data/repeat/item/position + 1) <= /data/count_selected_attendance, selected-at(/data/select_attendances, /data/repeat/item/position), '')" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/repeat/item/display" nodeset="/data/repeat/item/display" vellum:relevant="(#form/repeat/item/position + 1)" relevant="(/data/repeat/item/position + 1)" />

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/repeat/item/display/id_case" nodeset="/data/repeat/item/display/id_case" calculate="../@id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/repeat/item/display/travailleur_role_nom" nodeset="/data/repeat/item/display/travailleur_role_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = "attendance"][@status = 'open'][@case_id = #form/repeat/item/attendance_caseid]/travailleur_role_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = "attendance"][@status = 'open'][@case_id = /data/repeat/item/attendance_caseid]/travailleur_role_nom" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/repeat/item/display/campagne_nom" nodeset="/data/repeat/item/display/campagne_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = "attendance"][@status = 'open'][@case_id = #form/repeat/item/attendance_caseid]/campagne_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = "attendance"][@status = 'open'][@case_id = /data/repeat/item/attendance_caseid]/campagne_nom" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/repeat/item/display/validation" nodeset="/data/repeat/item/display/validation" vellum:calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = "attendance"][@status = 'open'][@case_id = #form/repeat/item/attendance_caseid]/validation" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = "attendance"][@status = 'open'][@case_id = /data/repeat/item/attendance_caseid]/validation" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/repeat/item/display/travailleur_infos" nodeset="/data/repeat/item/display/travailleur_infos" vellum:calculate="concat("|", #form/repeat/item/display/date_presence, "|", #form/repeat/item/display/travailleur_role_nom, "|", #form/repeat/item/display/campagne_nom, "|", #form/repeat/item/display/validation, "|", "
")" calculate="concat("|", /data/repeat/item/display/date_presence, "|", /data/repeat/item/display/travailleur_role_nom, "|", /data/repeat/item/display/campagne_nom, "|", /data/repeat/item/display/validation, "|", "
")" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repeat/item/display/close_attendance/case/update/raison_suppression" calculate=""Formulaire suppression fiche de présence"" />

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/label_resume" nodeset="/data/label_resume" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/confirm_suppression" nodeset="/data/confirm_suppression" required="true()" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/repeat/@ids" value="join(' ', instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = "attendance"][campagne_id = 'campagne_polio_juin_2025'][index/parent = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id][@status = 'open'])" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/repeat/@count" value="count-selected(/data/repeat/@ids)" />

			<setvalue event="jr-insert" ref="/data/repeat/item/@id" value="selected-at(/data/repeat/@ids, ../@index)" />
			<itext>
				<translation lang="fra" default="">
					<text id="informations_gographiques-label">
						<value>Informations géographiques</value>
					</text>
					<text id="campagne_id-label">

					</text>
					<text id="select_attendances-label">
						<value>Sélectionnez les dates des fiches de présences à supprimer</value>
					</text>

						<value>## Résumé des Informations

| Date Fiche | Role |Campagne |Validation Fiche |
|:----:|:----|:----|:----|
<output value="/data/join_travailleur_infos" vellum:value="#form/join_travailleur_infos" />
            </value>
						<value form="markdown">## Résumé des Informations

| Date Fiche | Role |Campagne |Validation Fiche |
|:----:|:----|:----|:----|
<output value="/data/join_travailleur_infos" vellum:value="#form/join_travailleur_infos" />
            </value>
					</text>
					<text id="confirm_suppression-label">
						<value>Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir supprimer ces fiches de présences?</value>

					<text id="confirm_suppression-oui-label">
						<value>Oui</value>

				<translation lang="en">
					<text id="informations_gographiques-label">
						<value>Informations géographiques</value>
					</text>
					<text id="campagne_id-label">
						<value>Select the campaign:</value>
					</text>
					<text id="select_attendances-label">
						<value>Sélectionnez les dates des fiches de présences à supprimer</value>
					</text>
					<text id="label_resume-label">
						<value>## Résumé des Informations

| Date Fiche | Role |Campagne |Validation Fiche |
|:----:|:----|:----|:----|
<output value="/data/join_travailleur_infos" vellum:value="#form/join_travailleur_infos" />
            </value>
						<value form="markdown">## Résumé des Informations

| Date Fiche | Role |Campagne |Validation Fiche |
|:----:|:----|:----|:----|
<output value="/data/join_travailleur_infos" vellum:value="#form/join_travailleur_infos" />
            </value>
					</text>
					<text id="confirm_suppression-label">
						<value>Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir supprimer ces fiches de présences?</value>
					</text>
					<text id="confirm_suppression-oui-label">
						<value>Oui</value>
					</text>
				</translation>
			</itext>
		</model>
	</h:head>
	<h:body>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/informations_gographiques" ref="/data/informations_gographiques" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('informations_gographiques-label')" />
		</group>
		<select1 vellum:ref="#form/campagne_id" ref="/data/campagne_id">
			<label ref="jr:itext('campagne_id-label')" />
			<itemset nodeset="instance('campagnes_label')/campagnes_label_list/campagnes_label">
				<label ref="campagne_label" />
				<value ref="campagne_id" />
			</itemset>
		</select1>
		<select vellum:ref="#form/select_attendances" ref="/data/select_attendances">
			<label ref="jr:itext('select_attendances-label')" />
			<itemset nodeset="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = "attendance"][campagne_id = 'campagne_polio_juin_2025'][index/parent = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id][@status = 'open']">

				<value ref="@case_id" />

		</select>
		<group>
			<repeat jr:count="/data/repeat/@count" jr:noAddRemove="true()" vellum:nodeset="#form/repeat/item" nodeset="/data/repeat/item">

		<select1 vellum:ref="#form/confirm_suppression" ref="/data/confirm_suppression">

				<label ref="jr:itext('confirm_suppression-oui-label')" />
				<value>oui</value>
			</item>
		</select1>
	</h:body>
</h:html>

<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum" vellum:ignore="richText">
  <h:head>
    <h:title>(hide)Copie de Valider Fiches de Présence</h:title>
    <model>
      <instance>
        <data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/A25CCD52-1961-49BA-B407-CDBBFFEA65B5" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="(hide)Copie de Valider Fiches de Présence">
          <var>
            <location_id/>
            <location_name/>
            <location_type/>
            <supply_point_id vellum:comment="Get the case id of the supply point which is the supply_point_id of the location where the user is."/>
            <count_attendance_caseids/>
            <loaded_attendance_caseids/>
            <loaded_list_travailleur/>
            <sort_list_display_values/>
            <add_line_return_list_display_values/>
            <list_display_values/>
            <date_du_jour/>
            <date_validation_format/>
            <prev_validation_status/>
            <last_attendance_submitted_time_format/>
            <pays_id/>
            <pays_nom/>
            <departement_id/>
            <departement_nom/>
            <zone_id/>
            <zone_nom/>
            <commune_id/>
            <commune_nom/>
            <fosa_id/>
            <fosa_nom/>
            <user_role/>
            <user_val_step/>
            <attendance_validation_caseid/>
          </var>
          <grp_presence_validation_done>
            <label_already_recorded/>
            <flag_quitter/>
          </grp_presence_validation_done>
          <informations_fiche_de_presence>
            <attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t/>
            <tablea_header/>
            <valider_fiche/>
          </informations_fiche_de_presence>
          <grp_presence_ko_zero>
            <label_already_recorded/>
            <flag_quitter/>
          </grp_presence_ko_zero>
          <repreat_attendance jr:template="">
            <repeat_current_position/>
            <attendance_caseid/>
            <attendance_open/>
            <caseid_to_update/>
            <workers_number/>
            <display>
              <update_attendance_case vellum:case_type="attendance" vellum:role="SaveToCase">
                <case xmlns="http://commcarehq.org/case/transaction/v2" case_id="" date_modified="" user_id="">
                  <update>
                    <validation/>
                    <date_validation/>
                  </update>
                </case>
              </update_attendance_case>
            </display>
          </repreat_attendance>
          <save>
            <validation_status/>
            <attendance_validation_step/>
            <validation/>
            <date_validation/>
            <count_attendance_validated/>
          </save>
        </data>
      </instance>
      <instance src="jr://instance/session" id="commcaresession"/>
      <instance src="jr://instance/casedb" id="casedb"/>
      <instance src="jr://fixture/locations" id="locations"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/location_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/location_name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/name"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/location_type" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/location_type"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/supply_point_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/supply_point_id"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/count_attendance_caseids" calculate="count-selected(/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids)"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_caseids"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_join_travailleurs_attendance_info"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/sort_list_display_values" calculate="if(/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur != "", sort(string(/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur), true()), "")"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/add_line_return_list_display_values" calculate="replace(/data/var/sort_list_display_values, "@", "
")"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/list_display_values" calculate="replace(/data/var/add_line_return_list_display_values, "_", " ")"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/date_du_jour" calculate="today()"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/date_validation_format" calculate="format-date(date(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/date_validation), "%e/%m/%Y")"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/prev_validation_status" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/category"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/last_attendance_submitted_time_format" calculate="format-date(date(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_submitted_time), "%e/%m/%Y")"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/pays_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/pays_id"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/pays_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/pays_nom"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/departement_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/departement_id"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/departement_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/departement_nom"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/zone_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/zone_id"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/zone_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/zone_nom"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/commune_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/commune_id"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/commune_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/commune_nom"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/fosa_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/fosa_id"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/fosa_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/fosa_nom"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/user_role" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/user_role"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/user_val_step" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/val_step"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/var/attendance_validation_caseid" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/grp_presence_validation_done" relevant="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/category = 1 and instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_count_workers = instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/count_attendance_validated"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/grp_presence_validation_done/label_already_recorded"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter" constraint="1 = 2" jr:constraintMsg="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter-constraintMsg')"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence" relevant="not(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/category = 1 and instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_count_workers = instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/count_attendance_validated)"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/tablea_header"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche" required="true()"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero" relevant="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche = 'non'"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter" constraint="1 = 2" jr:constraintMsg="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter-constraintMsg')"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/repeat_current_position" calculate="position(..)"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/attendance_caseid" calculate="selected-at(/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids, /data/repreat_attendance/repeat_current_position)"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/attendance_open" calculate="count(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'attendance'][@case_id = /data/repreat_attendance/attendance_caseid])"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/caseid_to_update" calculate="if(/data/repreat_attendance/attendance_open > 0, /data/repreat_attendance/attendance_caseid, /data/var/attendance_validation_caseid)"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/workers_number" calculate="if(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'attendance'][@case_id = /data/repreat_attendance/attendance_caseid]/validation = "", 1, 0)"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/display"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/display/update_attendance_case/case/update/validation" calculate="/data/save/validation"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/display/update_attendance_case/case/update/date_validation" calculate="/data/save/date_validation"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/display/update_attendance_case/case/@date_modified" calculate="/data/meta/timeEnd" type="xsd:dateTime"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/display/update_attendance_case/case/@user_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/display/update_attendance_case/case/@case_id" calculate="/data/repreat_attendance/caseid_to_update"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/save" relevant="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche = 'oui'"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/save/validation_status" calculate="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche = 'oui'"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/save/attendance_validation_step" calculate="/data/var/user_val_step + 1"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/save/validation" calculate="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/save/date_validation" calculate="/data/var/date_du_jour"/>
      <bind nodeset="/data/save/count_attendance_validated" calculate="coalesce(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/count_attendance_validated, 0) + sum(/data/repreat_attendance/workers_number)"/>
      <setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_caseids"/>
      <setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_join_travailleurs_attendance_info"/>
      <setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/var/prev_validation_status" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/category"/>
      <setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/var/user_role" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/user_role"/>
      <setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/var/user_val_step" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/val_step"/>
      <itext>
        <translation lang="fra" default="">
          <text id="var-label">
            <value>variables</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_presence_validation_done-label">
            <value>Validation Fiche de Présence</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_presence_validation_done/label_already_recorded-label">
            <value>#### Vous avez déjà validé la fiche de présence</value>
            <value form="markdown">#### Vous avez déjà validé la fiche de présence</value>
          </text>

  <h:body>
    <group ref="/data/var">
      <label ref="jr:itext('var-label')"/>
    </group>
    <group ref="/data/grp_presence_validation_done" appearance="field-list">
      <label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done-label')"/>
      <trigger ref="/data/grp_presence_validation_done/label_already_recorded" appearance="minimal">
        <label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done/label_already_recorded-label')"/>
      </trigger>
      <trigger ref="/data/grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter" appearance="minimal">
        <label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter-label')"/>
        <alert ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter-constraintMsg')"/>
      </trigger>
    </group>
    <group ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence" appearance="field-list">
      <label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence-label')"/>
      <trigger ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t" appearance="minimal">
        <label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t-label')"/>
      </trigger>
      <trigger ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/tablea_header" appearance="minimal">
        <label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/tablea_header-label')"/>
      </trigger>
      <select1 ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche">
        <label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche-label')"/>
        <item>
          <label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche-oui-label')"/>
          <value>oui</value>
        </item>
        <item>
          <label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche-non-label')"/>
          <value>non</value>
        </item>
      </select1>
    </group>
    <group ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero" appearance="field-list">
      <label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero-label')"/>
      <trigger ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded" appearance="minimal">
        <label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded-label')"/>
      </trigger>
      <trigger ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter" appearance="minimal">
        <label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter-label')"/>
        <alert ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter-constraintMsg')"/>
      </trigger>
    </group>
    <group>
      <label ref="jr:itext('repreat_attendance-label')"/>
      <repeat jr:count="/data/var/count_attendance_caseids" jr:noAddRemove="true()" nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance">
        <group ref="/data/repreat_attendance/display"/>
      </repeat>
    </group>
    <group ref="/data/save">
      <label ref="jr:itext('save-label')"/>
    </group>
  </h:body>
</h:html>

<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum">
  <h:head>
    <h:title>[OLD] Modifier Infos Acteur</h:title>
    <model>
      <instance>
        <data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/284F738C-A8EA-416B-8402-37779BC91408" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="[OLD] Modifier Infos Acteur">
          <location_information>
            <location_id/>
            <location_code/>
            <location_type/>
            <location_nom/>
          </location_information>
          <grp_info_socio>
            <worker_information>
              <nom/>
              <prenom/>
              <date_de_naissance/>
              <dob_display/>
              <lieu_naissance/>
              <nom_majuscule/>
              <prenom_format/>
              <lieu_naissance_maj/>
            </worker_information>
            <gender/>
          </grp_info_socio>
          <contact>
            <existence_mobile_money/>
            <op_telecom_mm/>
            <telephone_mm/>
            <label_portabilite_1 vellum:comment="Display Condition : not((#form/contact/op_telecom_mm = 'togocom' and (regex(#form/contact/telephone_mm, '^[9]{1}[0|1|2|3]{1}[0-9]{6}$') or regex(#form/contact/telephone_mm, '^[7]{1}[0|1|2|3]{1}[0-9]{6}$'))) or (#form/contact/op_telecom_mm = 'moov' and (regex(#form/contact/telephone_mm, '^[9]{1}[6|7|8|9]{1}[0-9]{6}$') or regex(#form/contact/telephone_mm, '^[7]{1}[6|7|8|9]{1}[0-9]{6}$')))) and #form/contact/telephone_mm != '' and #form/contact/op_telecom_mm != ''"/>
            <numero_existe/>
            <telephone_indicatif/>
            <op_telecom_contact/>
            <telephone_contact/>
            <telephone/>
          </contact>
          <grp_verification_tel>
            <label_deja_enregistre/>
            <warnning_deja_enregistre/>
          </grp_verification_tel>
          <grp_identite>
            <type_piece/>
            <nin_id/>
            <expiration_date_id_card/>
            <photo_nin/>
            <photo_value/>
            <photo__output_valuedatagrp_identitephoto_value__fra/>
          </grp_identite>
          <qualif_fonction>
            <fonction_type_code/>
            <fonction_code/>
            <fonction_autre/>
            <fonction/>
            <fonction_display/>
          </qualif_fonction>
          <grp_resume>
            <label_resume_1/>
            <consentement_worker/>
            <signature/>
            <date_dob_display/>
          </grp_resume>
          <var>
            <nom_complet/>
            <telephone_for_display/>
            <nom_unique/>
          </var>
          <properties_display>
            <type_piece_display/>
            <niveau_display/>
          </properties_display>
        </data>
      </instance>
      <instance src="jr://instance/session" id="commcaresession"/>
      <instance src="jr://instance/casedb" id="casedb"/>
      <instance src="jr://fixture/locations" id="locations"/>
      <instance src="jr://fixture/item-list:worker_fonction" id="worker_fonction"/>
      <instance src="jr://fixture/item-list:worker_fonction_type" id="worker_fonction_type"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information" nodeset="/data/location_information"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/location_id" nodeset="/data/location_information/location_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/location_code" nodeset="/data/location_information/location_code" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/site_code"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/location_type" nodeset="/data/location_information/location_type" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@type"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/location_nom" nodeset="/data/location_information/location_nom" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/name"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_info_socio" nodeset="/data/grp_info_socio"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_info_socio/worker_information" nodeset="/data/grp_info_socio/worker_information"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_info_socio/worker_information/nom" nodeset="/data/grp_info_socio/worker_information/nom" type="xsd:string" constraint="not(regex(., '[0-9]+'))" jr:constraintMsg="jr:itext('grp_info_socio/worker_information/nom-constraintMsg')" required="true()"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_info_socio/worker_information/prenom" nodeset="/data/grp_info_socio/worker_information/prenom" type="xsd:string" constraint="not(regex(., '[0-9]+'))" jr:constraintMsg="jr:itext('grp_info_socio/worker_information/prenom-constraintMsg')" required="true()"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_info_socio/worker_information/date_de_naissance" nodeset="/data/grp_info_socio/worker_information/date_de_naissance" type="xsd:date" constraint="not(int(today() - .) div 365.25 < 18)" jr:constraintMsg="jr:itext('grp_info_socio/worker_information/date_de_naissance-constraintMsg')" required="true()"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_info_socio/worker_information/dob_display" nodeset="/data/grp_info_socio/worker_information/dob_display" vellum:calculate="format-date(#form/grp_info_socio/worker_information/date_de_naissance, '%e %b %Y')" calculate="format-date(/data/grp_info_socio/worker_information/date_de_naissance, '%e %b %Y')"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_info_socio/worker_information/lieu_naissance" nodeset="/data/grp_info_socio/worker_information/lieu_naissance" type="xsd:string" relevant="1=2" required="true()"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_info_socio/worker_information/nom_majuscule" nodeset="/data/grp_info_socio/worker_information/nom_majuscule" vellum:calculate="upper-case(#form/grp_info_socio/worker_information/nom)" calculate="upper-case(/data/grp_info_socio/worker_information/nom)"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_info_socio/worker_information/prenom_format" nodeset="/data/grp_info_socio/worker_information/prenom_format" vellum:calculate="concat(upper-case(substr(#form/grp_info_socio/worker_information/prenom, 0, 1)), lower-case(substr(#form/grp_info_socio/worker_information/prenom, 1, string-length(#form/grp_info_socio/worker_information/prenom))))" calculate="concat(upper-case(substr(/data/grp_info_socio/worker_information/prenom, 0, 1)), lower-case(substr(/data/grp_info_socio/worker_information/prenom, 1, string-length(/data/grp_info_socio/worker_information/prenom))))"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_info_socio/worker_information/lieu_naissance_maj" nodeset="/data/grp_info_socio/worker_information/lieu_naissance_maj" vellum:calculate="concat(upper-case(substr(#form/grp_info_socio/worker_information/lieu_naissance, 0, 1)), lower-case(substr(#form/grp_info_socio/worker_information/lieu_naissance, 1, string-length(#form/grp_info_socio/worker_information/lieu_naissance))))" calculate="concat(upper-case(substr(/data/grp_info_socio/worker_information/lieu_naissance, 0, 1)), lower-case(substr(/data/grp_info_socio/worker_information/lieu_naissance, 1, string-length(/data/grp_info_socio/worker_information/lieu_naissance))))"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_info_socio/gender" nodeset="/data/grp_info_socio/gender" required="true()"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/contact" nodeset="/data/contact"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/contact/existence_mobile_money" nodeset="/data/contact/existence_mobile_money" relevant="1=2" required="true()"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/contact/op_telecom_mm" nodeset="/data/contact/op_telecom_mm" vellum:relevant="#form/contact/existence_mobile_money = 'oui'" relevant="/data/contact/existence_mobile_money = 'oui'" required="true()"/>

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/url_photo_nin" nodeset="/data/var/url_photo_nin" vellum:calculate="concat("https://www.commcarehq.org/a/", #form/var/commcare_project, "/api/form/attachment/", /data/meta/instanceID, "/", #form/grp_identite/piece_valide_grp/photo_nin_value)" calculate="concat("https://www.commcarehq.org/a/", /data/var/commcare_project, "/api/form/attachment/", /data/meta/instanceID, "/", /data/grp_identite/piece_valide_grp/photo_nin_value)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/url_photo_signature" nodeset="/data/var/url_photo_signature" vellum:calculate="concat("https://www.commcarehq.org/a/", #form/var/commcare_project, "/api/form/attachment/", /data/meta/instanceID, "/", #form/var/photo_signature)" calculate="concat("https://www.commcarehq.org/a/", /data/var/commcare_project, "/api/form/attachment/", /data/meta/instanceID, "/", /data/var/photo_signature)" />

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/url_photo_nin_ucr" nodeset="/data/var/url_photo_nin_ucr" vellum:calculate="concat("[Voir Pièce d'identité](https://www.commcarehq.org/a/", #form/var/commcare_project, "/api/form/attachment/", /data/meta/instanceID, "/", #form/grp_identite/piece_valide_grp/photo_nin_value, ")")" calculate="concat("[Voir Pièce d'identité](https://www.commcarehq.org/a/", /data/var/commcare_project, "/api/form/attachment/", /data/meta/instanceID, "/", /data/grp_identite/piece_valide_grp/photo_nin_value, ")")" />

<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum">
  <h:head>
    <h:title>Supprimer Acteur</h:title>
    <model>
      <instance>
        <data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/1136737C-7D90-49E3-BC9D-5C2D7F998157" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="Supprimer Acteur">
          <choose_action/>
          <grp_delete>
            <label_info_worker/>
            <confirm_deletion/>
            <raison_suppression/>
          </grp_delete>
        </data>
      </instance>
      <instance src="jr://instance/casedb" id="casedb"/>
      <instance src="jr://instance/session" id="commcaresession"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/choose_action" nodeset="/data/choose_action" required="true()"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_delete" nodeset="/data/grp_delete" vellum:relevant="#form/choose_action = 'Oui'" relevant="/data/choose_action = 'Oui'"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_delete/label_info_worker" nodeset="/data/grp_delete/label_info_worker"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_delete/confirm_deletion" nodeset="/data/grp_delete/confirm_deletion" required="true()"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_delete/raison_suppression" nodeset="/data/grp_delete/raison_suppression" type="xsd:string"/>
      <itext>
        <translation lang="fra" default="">
          <text id="choose_action-label">
            <value>Voulez-vous supprimer le travailleur ?</value>
          </text>
          <text id="choose_action-Oui-label">
            <value>Oui</value>
          </text>
          <text id="choose_action-Non-label">
            <value>Non</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_delete-label">
            <value>Supprimer le travailleur</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_delete/label_info_worker-label">
            <value>* Nom complet : **<output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/nom_complet" vellum:value="#case/nom_complet"/>**
* Numéro de téléphone : **<output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/telephone_mm" vellum:value="#case/telephone_mm"/>**</value>
            <value form="markdown">* Nom complet : **<output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/nom_complet" vellum:value="#case/nom_complet"/>**
* Numéro de téléphone : **<output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/telephone_mm" vellum:value="#case/telephone_mm"/>**</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_delete/confirm_deletion-label">
            <value>*Cette action est irréversible sur votre application. Vous devrez contacter un administrateur*

**Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir supprimer ce collaborateur ?**</value>
            <value form="markdown">*Cette action est irréversible sur votre application. Vous devrez contacter un administrateur*

**Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir supprimer ce collaborateur ?**</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_delete/confirm_deletion-yes-label">
            <value>Oui</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_delete/confirm_deletion-no-label">
            <value>Non</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_delete/raison_suppression-label">
            <value>Pourquoi voulez-vous supprimer ce travailleur?</value>
          </text>
        </translation>
        <translation lang="en">
          <text id="choose_action-label">
            <value>Do you want to edit or delete the worker?</value>
          </text>
          <text id="choose_action-Oui-label">
            <value>Oui</value>
          </text>
          <text id="choose_action-Non-label">
            <value>Non</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_delete-label">
            <value>Delete Worker</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_delete/label_info_worker-label">
            <value>* Full Name: **<output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/nom_complet" vellum:value="#case/nom_complet"/>**
* Phone Number: **<output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/telephone_mm" vellum:value="#case/telephone_mm"/>**</value>
            <value form="markdown">* Full Name: **<output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/nom_complet" vellum:value="#case/nom_complet"/>**
* Phone Number: **<output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/telephone_mm" vellum:value="#case/telephone_mm"/>**</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_delete/confirm_deletion-label">
            <value>*This action is not reversible on your application. You will need to contact an administrator*

**Are you sure you want to delete this worker?**</value>
            <value form="markdown">*This action is not reversible on your application. You will need to contact an administrator*

**Are you sure you want to delete this worker?**</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_delete/confirm_deletion-yes-label">
            <value>Yes</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_delete/confirm_deletion-no-label">
            <value>No</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_delete/raison_suppression-label">
            <value>Pourquoi voulez-vous supprimer ce travailleur?</value>
          </text>
        </translation>
      </itext>
    </model>
    <vellum:hashtags>{"#case/nom_complet":null,"#case/telephone_mm":null}</vellum:hashtags>
    <vellum:hashtagTransforms>{"prefixes":{"#case/":"instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/","#user/":"instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/"}}</vellum:hashtagTransforms>
  </h:head>
  <h:body>
    <select1 vellum:ref="#form/choose_action" ref="/data/choose_action">
      <label ref="jr:itext('choose_action-label')"/>
      <item>
        <label ref="jr:itext('choose_action-Oui-label')"/>
        <value>Oui</value>
      </item>
      <item>
        <label ref="jr:itext('choose_action-Non-label')"/>
        <value>Non</value>
      </item>
    </select1>
    <group vellum:ref="#form/grp_delete" ref="/data/grp_delete" appearance="field-list">
      <label ref="jr:itext('grp_delete-label')"/>
      <trigger vellum:ref="#form/grp_delete/label_info_worker" ref="/data/grp_delete/label_info_worker" appearance="minimal">
        <label ref="jr:itext('grp_delete/label_info_worker-label')"/>
      </trigger>
      <select1 vellum:ref="#form/grp_delete/confirm_deletion" ref="/data/grp_delete/confirm_deletion">
        <label ref="jr:itext('grp_delete/confirm_deletion-label')"/>
        <item>
          <label ref="jr:itext('grp_delete/confirm_deletion-yes-label')"/>
          <value>yes</value>
        </item>
        <item>
          <label ref="jr:itext('grp_delete/confirm_deletion-no-label')"/>
          <value>no</value>
        </item>

      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/location_id" nodeset="/data/location_information/location_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/location_code" nodeset="/data/location_information/location_code" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/site_code"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/location_type" nodeset="/data/location_information/location_type" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@type"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/location_nom" nodeset="/data/location_information/location_nom" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/name"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/kyc_reset_notice" nodeset="/data/location_information/kyc_reset_notice"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/update_contact" nodeset="/data/update_contact"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks" nodeset="/data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm" nodeset="/data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm" required="true()"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_display" nodeset="/data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_display" vellum:calculate="cond(#form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm = 'moov', "Moov", #form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm = 'zamani', "Zamani", #form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm = 'niger_telecoms', "Niger Telecoms", #form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm = 'airtel', "Airtel", '')" calculate="cond(/data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm = 'moov', "Moov", /data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm = 'zamani', "Zamani", /data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm = 'niger_telecoms', "Niger Telecoms", /data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm = 'airtel', "Airtel", '')"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/provider_kyc_code_display_zamani" nodeset="/data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/provider_kyc_code_display_zamani" vellum:relevant="#form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm = 'zamani' and #case/op_telecom_mm != #form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm" relevant="/data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm = 'zamani' and instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/op_telecom_mm != /data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/provider_kyc_code_display_moov" nodeset="/data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/provider_kyc_code_display_moov" vellum:relevant="#form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm = 'moov' and #case/op_telecom_mm != #form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm" relevant="/data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm = 'moov' and instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/op_telecom_mm != /data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/provider_kyc_code_display_niger_telecoms" nodeset="/data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/provider_kyc_code_display_niger_telecoms" vellum:relevant="#form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm = 'niger_telecoms' and #case/op_telecom_mm != #form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm" relevant="/data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm = 'niger_telecoms' and instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/op_telecom_mm != /data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/provider_kyc_code_display_niger_airtel" nodeset="/data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/provider_kyc_code_display_niger_airtel" vellum:relevant="#form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm = 'airtel' and #case/op_telecom_mm != #form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm" relevant="/data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm = 'airtel' and instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/op_telecom_mm != /data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/kyc_validated" nodeset="/data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/kyc_validated" constraint=". = '1'" vellum:relevant="#case/op_telecom_mm != #form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm" relevant="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/op_telecom_mm != /data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm" required="true()"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/kyc_nok" nodeset="/data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/kyc_nok" vellum:relevant="#form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/kyc_validated = '0'" relevant="/data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/kyc_validated = '0'"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/kyc_validated_display" nodeset="/data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/kyc_validated_display" vellum:calculate="cond(#form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/kyc_validated = '1', "oui", #form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/kyc_validated = '0', "non", '')" calculate="cond(/data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/kyc_validated = '1', "oui", /data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/kyc_validated = '0', "non", '')"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/update_contact/contact" nodeset="/data/update_contact/contact"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/update_contact/contact/telephone_mm" nodeset="/data/update_contact/contact/telephone_mm" type="xsd:string" constraint="regex(., '^(229|00229|\+229)?([4-9][0-9]{6}|[8-9][0-9]{7})$') and (string-length(.) = 8 or string-length(.) = 11 or string-length(.) = 12)" jr:constraintMsg="jr:itext('update_contact/contact/telephone_mm-constraintMsg')" required="true()"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/update_contact/contact/label_telco" nodeset="/data/update_contact/contact/label_telco" vellum:constraint="#form/update_contact/contact/moov_regex or #form/update_contact/contact/zamani_regex or #form/update_contact/contact/niger_telecoms_regex or #form/update_contact/contact/airtel_regex" constraint="/data/update_contact/contact/moov_regex or /data/update_contact/contact/zamani_regex or /data/update_contact/contact/niger_telecoms_regex or /data/update_contact/contact/airtel_regex" vellum:relevant="not(#form/update_contact/contact/moov_regex or #form/update_contact/contact/zamani_regex or #form/update_contact/contact/niger_telecoms_regex or #form/update_contact/contact/airtel_regex) and string-length(string(#form/update_contact/contact/telephone_mm)) = 8" relevant="not(/data/update_contact/contact/moov_regex or /data/update_contact/contact/zamani_regex or /data/update_contact/contact/niger_telecoms_regex or /data/update_contact/contact/airtel_regex) and string-length(string(/data/update_contact/contact/telephone_mm)) = 8"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/update_contact/contact/compte_momo_actif" nodeset="/data/update_contact/contact/compte_momo_actif" required="true()"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/update_contact/contact/pour_pouvoir_effectuer_le_paiement_il_est_obligatoire_davoir_un_compte_mobi" nodeset="/data/update_contact/contact/pour_pouvoir_effectuer_le_paiement_il_est_obligatoire_davoir_un_compte_mobi" constraint="1 = 2" vellum:relevant="#form/update_contact/contact/compte_momo_actif = 'non'" relevant="/data/update_contact/contact/compte_momo_actif = 'non'"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/update_contact/contact/moov_regex" nodeset="/data/update_contact/contact/moov_regex" vellum:calculate="regex(#form/update_contact/contact/telephone_mm, '^[7-9][4-5][0-9]{6}$')" calculate="regex(/data/update_contact/contact/telephone_mm, '^[7-9][4-5][0-9]{6}$')"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/update_contact/contact/zamani_regex" nodeset="/data/update_contact/contact/zamani_regex" vellum:calculate="regex(#form/update_contact/contact/telephone_mm, '^[8-9][0-2][0-9]{6}$')" calculate="regex(/data/update_contact/contact/telephone_mm, '^[8-9][0-2][0-9]{6}$')"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/update_contact/contact/niger_telecoms_regex" nodeset="/data/update_contact/contact/niger_telecoms_regex" vellum:calculate="regex(#form/update_contact/contact/telephone_mm, '^[9][3][0-9]{6}$')" calculate="regex(/data/update_contact/contact/telephone_mm, '^[9][3][0-9]{6}$')"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/update_contact/contact/airtel_regex" nodeset="/data/update_contact/contact/airtel_regex" vellum:calculate="regex(#form/update_contact/contact/telephone_mm, '^[7-9][6-7]|[8-9][8-9][0-9]{6}$')" calculate="regex(/data/update_contact/contact/telephone_mm, '^[7-9][6-7]|[8-9][8-9][0-9]{6}$')"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/update_contact/contact/numero_existe" nodeset="/data/update_contact/contact/numero_existe" vellum:calculate="count(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_nouveau'][@external_id = #form/update_contact/contact/telephone_mm][@status = 'open'][@case_id != #form/var/travailleur_nouveau_case_id]/@case_id)" calculate="count(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_nouveau'][@external_id = /data/update_contact/contact/telephone_mm][@status = 'open'][@case_id != /data/var/travailleur_nouveau_case_id]/@case_id)"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/update_contact/contact/telephone_indicatif" nodeset="/data/update_contact/contact/telephone_indicatif" vellum:calculate="concat('229', #form/update_contact/contact/telephone_mm)" calculate="concat('229', /data/update_contact/contact/telephone_mm)"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/update_contact/vrification_portabilit" nodeset="/data/update_contact/vrification_portabilit" vellum:relevant="#form/update_contact/contact/telephone_mm != '' and (#form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm = 'moov' and not(#form/update_contact/contact/moov_regex)) or (#form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm = 'zamani' and not(#form/update_contact/contact/zamani_regex)) or (#form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm = 'niger_telecoms' and not(#form/update_contact/contact/niger_telecoms_regex)) or (#form/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm = 'airtel' and not(#form/update_contact/contact/airtel_regex))" relevant="/data/update_contact/contact/telephone_mm != '' and (/data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm = 'moov' and not(/data/update_contact/contact/moov_regex)) or (/data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm = 'zamani' and not(/data/update_contact/contact/zamani_regex)) or (/data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm = 'niger_telecoms' and not(/data/update_contact/contact/niger_telecoms_regex)) or (/data/update_contact/grp_kyc_checks/op_telecom_mm = 'airtel' and not(/data/update_contact/contact/airtel_regex))"/>

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/manage_role_to_validate_case/update_role_to_validate_case" nodeset="/data/manage_role_to_validate_case/update_role_to_validate_case" vellum:relevant="#form/manage_role_to_validate_case/case_role_to_validate_exist" relevant="/data/manage_role_to_validate_case/case_role_to_validate_exist" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/manage_role_to_validate_case/update_role_to_validate_case/update_role_to_validate_case/case/update/state" calculate="1" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/manage_role_to_validate_case/update_role_to_validate_case/update_role_to_validate_case/case/@date_modified" calculate="/data/meta/timeEnd" type="xsd:dateTime" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/manage_role_to_validate_case/update_role_to_validate_case/update_role_to_validate_case/case/@user_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/manage_role_to_validate_case/update_role_to_validate_case/update_role_to_validate_case/case/@case_id" vellum:calculate="#form/manage_role_to_validate_case/case_id_role_to_validate" calculate="/data/manage_role_to_validate_case/case_id_role_to_validate" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var" nodeset="/data/var" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/create_child_case" nodeset="/data/var/create_child_case" vellum:relevant="not(#form/var/travailleur_role_existe)" relevant="not(/data/var/travailleur_role_existe)" calculate="true()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/nom_complet" nodeset="/data/var/nom_complet" vellum:calculate="#case/nom_complet" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/nom_complet" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/campagne_id" nodeset="/data/var/campagne_id" vellum:calculate="#form/grp_category/grp_category/select_campaign" calculate="/data/grp_category/grp_category/select_campaign" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/campagne_nom" nodeset="/data/var/campagne_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('campagnes_label')/campagnes_label_list/campagnes_label[campagne_id = #form/grp_category/grp_category/select_campaign]/campagne_label" calculate="instance('campagnes_label')/campagnes_label_list/campagnes_label[campagne_id = /data/grp_category/grp_category/select_campaign]/campagne_label" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/travailleur_role" nodeset="/data/var/travailleur_role" vellum:calculate="#form/grp_category/grp_category/worker_category" calculate="/data/grp_category/grp_category/worker_category" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/travailleur_role_nom" nodeset="/data/var/travailleur_role_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('categorie_location_function')/categorie_location_function_list/categorie_location_function[location_type = #form/location_information/location_type][fonctions = #form/var/fonction_code][categorie_code = #form/grp_category/grp_category/worker_category]/categorie_name" calculate="instance('categorie_location_function')/categorie_location_function_list/categorie_location_function[location_type = /data/location_information/location_type][fonctions = /data/var/fonction_code][categorie_code = /data/grp_category/grp_category/worker_category]/categorie_name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/travailleur_nouveau_id" nodeset="/data/var/travailleur_nouveau_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/travailleur_role_external_id" nodeset="/data/var/travailleur_role_external_id" vellum:calculate="concat(#form/var/travailleur_nouveau_id, "-", #case/worker_location_id, "-", #form/grp_category/grp_category/select_campaign)" calculate="concat(/data/var/travailleur_nouveau_id, "-", instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/worker_location_id, "-", /data/grp_category/grp_category/select_campaign)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/travailleur_role_existe" nodeset="/data/var/travailleur_role_existe" vellum:calculate="count(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][@external_id = #form/var/travailleur_role_external_id]/@case_id) > 0" calculate="count(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][@external_id = /data/var/travailleur_role_external_id]/@case_id) > 0" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/concat_category_campaign" nodeset="/data/var/concat_category_campaign" vellum:calculate="concat(#form/var/travailleur_role, "-", #form/var/campagne_id)" calculate="concat(/data/var/travailleur_role, "-", /data/var/campagne_id)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/fonction_code" nodeset="/data/var/fonction_code" vellum:calculate="#case/fonction_code" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/fonction_code" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/supply_point_id" nodeset="/data/var/supply_point_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'location_point'][@owner_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@case_id" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/worker_details/worker_existing_roles/@ids" value="join(' ', instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][index/parent = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/@case_id)" />

			<bind nodeset="/data/case_validation_update/update_validation_case/case/update/last_attendance_caseids" vellum:calculate="#form/case_validation_update/updated_last_attendance_caseids" calculate="/data/case_validation_update/updated_last_attendance_caseids" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/case_validation_update/update_validation_case/case/update/last_submitted_by" vellum:calculate="#form/var/user_full_info" calculate="/data/var/user_full_info" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/case_validation_update/update_validation_case/case/update/last_username" vellum:calculate="#form/var/username" calculate="/data/var/username" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/case_validation_update/update_validation_case/case/update/last_sub_time" vellum:calculate="#form/attendance_submitted_time" calculate="/data/attendance_submitted_time" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/case_validation_update/update_validation_case/case/update/date_attendance_completion" vellum:calculate="#form/var/date_attendance_completion" calculate="/data/var/date_attendance_completion" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/case_validation_update/update_validation_case/case/update/category" vellum:calculate="#form/case_validation_update/validation_status" calculate="/data/case_validation_update/validation_status" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/case_validation_update/update_validation_case/case/update/url_signature_submitter" vellum:calculate="#form/resume/url_signature_submitter" calculate="/data/resume/url_signature_submitter" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/case_validation_update/update_validation_case/case/update/url_signature_submitter_ucr" vellum:calculate="#form/resume/url_signature_submitter_ucr" calculate="/data/resume/url_signature_submitter_ucr" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/case_validation_update/update_validation_case/case/@date_modified" calculate="/data/meta/timeEnd" type="xsd:dateTime" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/case_validation_update/update_validation_case/case/@user_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/case_validation_update/update_validation_case/case/@case_id" vellum:calculate="#form/case_validation_update/validation_case_id" calculate="/data/case_validation_update/validation_case_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/case_validation_update/validation_case_id" nodeset="/data/case_validation_update/validation_case_id" vellum:calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = #form/var/validation_case_type][@external_id = #form/validation_external_id][1]/@case_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = /data/var/validation_case_type][@external_id = /data/validation_external_id][1]/@case_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/case_validation_update/old_join_travailleurs_attendance_info" nodeset="/data/case_validation_update/old_join_travailleurs_attendance_info" vellum:calculate="coalesce(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = #form/case_validation_update/validation_case_id]/last_join_travailleurs_attendance_info, '')" calculate="coalesce(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = /data/case_validation_update/validation_case_id]/last_join_travailleurs_attendance_info, '')" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/case_validation_update/updated_join_travailleurs_attendance_info" nodeset="/data/case_validation_update/updated_join_travailleurs_attendance_info" vellum:calculate="concat(#form/case_validation_update/old_join_travailleurs_attendance_info, " ", join(" ", #form/repeat_travailleur/display/concat_travailleur_info))" calculate="concat(/data/case_validation_update/old_join_travailleurs_attendance_info, " ", join(" ", /data/repeat_travailleur/display/concat_travailleur_info))" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/case_validation_update/old_last_attendance_caseids" nodeset="/data/case_validation_update/old_last_attendance_caseids" vellum:calculate="coalesce(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = #form/case_validation_update/validation_case_id]/last_attendance_caseids, '')" calculate="coalesce(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = /data/case_validation_update/validation_case_id]/last_attendance_caseids, '')" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/case_validation_update/updated_last_attendance_caseids" nodeset="/data/case_validation_update/updated_last_attendance_caseids" vellum:calculate="concat(#form/case_validation_update/old_last_attendance_caseids, " ", join(" ", #form/repeat_travailleur/display/display_group/attendance_case_id))" calculate="concat(/data/case_validation_update/old_last_attendance_caseids, " ", join(" ", /data/repeat_travailleur/display/display_group/attendance_case_id))" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/case_validation_update/old_last_count_workers" nodeset="/data/case_validation_update/old_last_count_workers" vellum:calculate="coalesce(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = #form/case_validation_update/validation_case_id]/last_count_workers, 0)" calculate="coalesce(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = /data/case_validation_update/validation_case_id]/last_count_workers, 0)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/case_validation_update/updated_last_count_workers" nodeset="/data/case_validation_update/updated_last_count_workers" vellum:calculate="#form/case_validation_update/old_last_count_workers + #form/var/count_workers_selected" calculate="/data/case_validation_update/old_last_count_workers + /data/var/count_workers_selected" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/case_validation_update/validation_status" nodeset="/data/case_validation_update/validation_status" calculate="0" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/case_validation_update/attendance_validation_step" nodeset="/data/case_validation_update/attendance_validation_step" vellum:calculate="if(#form/location_information/location_type = 'fosa', 0, 1)" calculate="if(/data/location_information/location_type = 'fosa', 0, 1)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/resume" nodeset="/data/resume" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/resume/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t" nodeset="/data/resume/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t" relevant="1 = 2" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/resume/tablea_header" nodeset="/data/resume/tablea_header" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/resume/consentement_worker" nodeset="/data/resume/consentement_worker" required="true()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/resume/nom_ou_username" nodeset="/data/resume/nom_ou_username" vellum:calculate="coalesce(#user/prenom_nom_majuscule, #user/username)" calculate="coalesce(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/prenom_nom_majuscule, instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/username)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/resume/signature_submitter" nodeset="/data/resume/signature_submitter" type="binary" required="true()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/resume/url_signature_submitter" nodeset="/data/resume/url_signature_submitter" vellum:calculate="concat("https://www.commcarehq.org/a/", #form/var/commcare_project, "/api/form/attachment/", /data/meta/instanceID, "/", #form/resume/signature_submitter)" calculate="concat("https://www.commcarehq.org/a/", /data/var/commcare_project, "/api/form/attachment/", /data/meta/instanceID, "/", /data/resume/signature_submitter)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/resume/url_signature_submitter_ucr" nodeset="/data/resume/url_signature_submitter_ucr" vellum:calculate="concat("[Voir Signature](https://www.commcarehq.org/a/", #form/var/commcare_project, "/api/form/attachment/", /data/meta/instanceID, "/", #form/resume/signature_submitter, ")")" calculate="concat("[Voir Signature](https://www.commcarehq.org/a/", /data/var/commcare_project, "/api/form/attachment/", /data/meta/instanceID, "/", /data/resume/signature_submitter, ")")" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" vellum:ref="#form/var/commcare_project" ref="/data/var/commcare_project" value="instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_project" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" vellum:ref="#form/var/username" ref="/data/var/username" vellum:value="#user/username" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/username" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/case_validation/create_validation_case/case/@case_id" value="uuid()" />

						<value>Résumé</value>

		<vellum:hashtags>{"#user/prenom_nom_majuscule":null,"#user/username":null}</vellum:hashtags>
		<vellum:hashtagTransforms>{"prefixes":{"#user/":"instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/"}}</vellum:hashtagTransforms>
	</h:head>
	<h:body>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/var" ref="/data/var">
			<label ref="jr:itext('var-label')" />
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/gps" ref="/data/gps" />
		<group vellum:ref="#form/location_information" ref="/data/location_information" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('location_information-label')" />
		</group>
		<select1 vellum:ref="#form/campagne_id" ref="/data/campagne_id">
			<label ref="jr:itext('campagne_id-label')" />
			<itemset nodeset="instance('campagnes_label')/campagnes_label_list/campagnes_label">
				<label ref="campagne_label" />
				<value ref="campagne_id" />
			</itemset>
		</select1>
		<input vellum:ref="#form/date_fiche_presence_saisie" ref="/data/date_fiche_presence_saisie">
			<label ref="jr:itext('date_fiche_presence_saisie-label')" />
			<alert ref="jr:itext('date_fiche_presence_saisie-constraintMsg')" />
		</input>
		<trigger vellum:ref="#form/display_error_today" ref="/data/display_error_today" appearance="minimal">
			<label ref="jr:itext('display_error_today-label')" />
		</trigger>
		<select1 vellum:ref="#form/copy-1-of-display_warning_today" ref="/data/copy-1-of-display_warning_today">
			<label ref="jr:itext('copy-1-of-display_warning_today-label')" />
			<item>
				<label ref="jr:itext('copy-1-of-display_warning_today-ok_fra-label')" />
				<value>ok_fra</value>
			</item>
		</select1>
		<select1 vellum:ref="#form/worker_category" ref="/data/worker_category">
			<label ref="jr:itext('worker_category-label')" />
			<itemset nodeset="instance('categorie_by_location')/categorie_by_location_list/categorie_by_location[location_type = /data/location_information/location_type]" vellum:nodeset="instance('categorie_by_location')/categorie_by_location_list/categorie_by_location[location_type = #form/location_information/location_type]">
				<label ref="categorie_name" />
				<value ref="categorie_code" />
				<sort ref="categorie_name" />
			</itemset>
		</select1>
		<select vellum:ref="#form/list_worker_present" ref="/data/list_worker_present">
			<label ref="jr:itext('list_worker_present-label')" />
			<itemset nodeset="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][@status = 'open'][@category = 'validated'][@owner_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id][campagne_id = /data/campagne_id][travailleur_role = /data/worker_category]" vellum:nodeset="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][@status = 'open'][@category = 'validated'][@owner_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id][campagne_id = #form/campagne_id][travailleur_role = #form/worker_category]">
				<label ref="nom_complet" />
				<value ref="@case_id" />
				<sort ref="nom_complet" />
			</itemset>
		</select>
		<trigger vellum:ref="#form/lbl_no_worker_mobile" ref="/data/lbl_no_worker_mobile" appearance="minimal">
			<label ref="jr:itext('lbl_no_worker_mobile-label')" />
			<alert ref="jr:itext('lbl_no_worker_mobile-constraintMsg')" />
		</trigger>
		<group>
			<repeat vellum:jr__count="#form/var/number_selected_workers" jr:count="/data/var/number_selected_workers" jr:noAddRemove="true()" vellum:nodeset="#form/repeat_travailleur" nodeset="/data/repeat_travailleur">
				<group vellum:ref="#form/repeat_travailleur/display" ref="/data/repeat_travailleur/display">
					<group vellum:ref="#form/repeat_travailleur/display/display_group" ref="/data/repeat_travailleur/display/display_group">
						<trigger vellum:ref="#form/repeat_travailleur/display/display_group/label_travailleur_name" ref="/data/repeat_travailleur/display/display_group/label_travailleur_name" appearance="minimal">
							<label ref="jr:itext('repeat_travailleur/display/display_group/label_travailleur_name-label')" />
						</trigger>
						<upload mediatype="image/*" vellum:ref="#form/repeat_travailleur/display/display_group/travailleur_signature" ref="/data/repeat_travailleur/display/display_group/travailleur_signature" appearance="signature">
							<label ref="jr:itext('repeat_travailleur/display/display_group/travailleur_signature-label')" />
						</upload>
					</group>
					<trigger vellum:ref="#form/repeat_travailleur/display/label_fiche_deja_signe" ref="/data/repeat_travailleur/display/label_fiche_deja_signe" appearance="minimal">
						<label ref="jr:itext('repeat_travailleur/display/label_fiche_deja_signe-label')" />
					</trigger>
				</group>
			</repeat>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/grp_utilisateur" ref="/data/grp_utilisateur" appearance="field-list" />
		<group vellum:ref="#form/grp_workers_count" ref="/data/grp_workers_count" appearance="field-list" />
		<group vellum:ref="#form/case_validation" ref="/data/case_validation">
			<label ref="jr:itext('case_validation-label')" />
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/case_validation_update" ref="/data/case_validation_update">
			<label ref="jr:itext('case_validation_update-label')" />
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/resume" ref="/data/resume">
			<label ref="jr:itext('resume-label')" />
