			<bind nodeset="/data/repeat_worker/item/display_campaign_category/display_worker_role_to_reject/delete_worker_role_to_reject/delete_worker_role_case/case/@case_id" vellum:calculate="#form/repeat_worker/item/travailleur_role_id" calculate="/data/repeat_worker/item/travailleur_role_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/summary" nodeset="/data/summary" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/summary/table_validation" nodeset="/data/summary/table_validation" vellum:relevant="#form/var/join_worker_role_info_to_validate != ''" relevant="/data/var/join_worker_role_info_to_validate != ''" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/summary/validate_workers" nodeset="/data/summary/validate_workers" constraint=". = 'yes'" required="true()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/summary/summary_rejection" nodeset="/data/summary/summary_rejection" vellum:relevant="#form/summary/validate_workers = 'no'" relevant="/data/summary/validate_workers = 'no'" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/summary/summary_rejection/table_rejection" nodeset="/data/summary/summary_rejection/table_rejection" vellum:relevant="#form/var/join_worker_role_info_to_reject != ''" relevant="/data/var/join_worker_role_info_to_reject != ''" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/role_to_validate_update" nodeset="/data/role_to_validate_update" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/role_to_validate_update/update_role_to_validate_case/case/update/state" calculate="0" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/role_to_validate_update/update_role_to_validate_case/case/@date_modified" calculate="/data/meta/timeEnd" type="xsd:dateTime" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/role_to_validate_update/update_role_to_validate_case/case/@user_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/role_to_validate_update/update_role_to_validate_case/case/@case_id" vellum:calculate="#form/role_to_validate_update/case_id_role_to_validate" calculate="/data/role_to_validate_update/case_id_role_to_validate" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/role_to_validate_update/case_id_role_to_validate" nodeset="/data/role_to_validate_update/case_id_role_to_validate" vellum:calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'role_to_validate'][index/parent = #form/var/supply_point_id][@category = #form/activity/worker_category][@external_id = #form/campagne_id][1]/@case_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'role_to_validate'][index/parent = /data/var/supply_point_id][@category = /data/activity/worker_category][@external_id = /data/campagne_id][1]/@case_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/role_to_validate_update/check_for_duplicate_case_id_role_to_validate" nodeset="/data/role_to_validate_update/check_for_duplicate_case_id_role_to_validate" vellum:calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'role_to_validate'][index/parent = #form/var/supply_point_id][@category = #form/activity/worker_category][@external_id = #form/campagne_id][2]/@case_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'role_to_validate'][index/parent = /data/var/supply_point_id][@category = /data/activity/worker_category][@external_id = /data/campagne_id][2]/@case_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/role_to_validate_update/delete_duplicate_role_to_validate_case_if_exists" nodeset="/data/role_to_validate_update/delete_duplicate_role_to_validate_case_if_exists" vellum:relevant="#form/role_to_validate_update/check_for_duplicate_case_id_role_to_validate != ''" relevant="/data/role_to_validate_update/check_for_duplicate_case_id_role_to_validate != ''" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/role_to_validate_update/delete_duplicate_role_to_validate_case_if_exists/delete_duplicate_role_to_validate_case_if_exists/case/update/close_reason" calculate="'Duplicate Role To Validate Case'" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/role_to_validate_update/delete_duplicate_role_to_validate_case_if_exists/delete_duplicate_role_to_validate_case_if_exists/case/close" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/role_to_validate_update/delete_duplicate_role_to_validate_case_if_exists/delete_duplicate_role_to_validate_case_if_exists/case/@date_modified" calculate="/data/meta/timeEnd" type="xsd:dateTime" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/role_to_validate_update/delete_duplicate_role_to_validate_case_if_exists/delete_duplicate_role_to_validate_case_if_exists/case/@user_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/role_to_validate_update/delete_duplicate_role_to_validate_case_if_exists/delete_duplicate_role_to_validate_case_if_exists/case/@case_id" vellum:calculate="#form/role_to_validate_update/check_for_duplicate_case_id_role_to_validate" calculate="/data/role_to_validate_update/check_for_duplicate_case_id_role_to_validate" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var" nodeset="/data/var" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/supply_point_id" nodeset="/data/var/supply_point_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/worker_role_name" nodeset="/data/var/worker_role_name" vellum:calculate="instance('categorie_by_location')/categorie_by_location_list/categorie_by_location[location_type = #form/location_information/location_type][categorie_code = #form/activity/worker_category]/categorie_name" calculate="instance('categorie_by_location')/categorie_by_location_list/categorie_by_location[location_type = /data/location_information/location_type][categorie_code = /data/activity/worker_category]/categorie_name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/old_roles_to_validate" nodeset="/data/var/old_roles_to_validate" vellum:calculate="count(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'role_to_validate'][index/parent = #form/var/supply_point_id][@state = '1'][@external_id = #form/campagne_id]/@case_id)" calculate="count(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'role_to_validate'][index/parent = /data/var/supply_point_id][@state = '1'][@external_id = /data/campagne_id]/@case_id)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/all_worker_role_ids" nodeset="/data/var/all_worker_role_ids" vellum:calculate="string(join(" ", instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][@status = 'open'][campaign_id = #form/campagne_id][worker_role = #form/activity/worker_category]/@case_id))" calculate="string(join(" ", instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][@status = 'open'][campaign_id = /data/campagne_id][worker_role = /data/activity/worker_category]/@case_id))" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/join_worker_role_info_to_reject" nodeset="/data/var/join_worker_role_info_to_reject" vellum:calculate="join("
", #form/repeat_worker/item/display_campaign_category/display_worker_role_to_reject/concat_worker_info_to_reject)" calculate="join("
", /data/repeat_worker/item/display_campaign_category/display_worker_role_to_reject/concat_worker_info_to_reject)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/join_worker_role_info_to_validate" nodeset="/data/var/join_worker_role_info_to_validate" vellum:calculate="join("
", #form/repeat_worker/item/display_campaign_category/display_worker_role_validated/concat_worker_info_to_display)" calculate="join("
", /data/repeat_worker/item/display_campaign_category/display_worker_role_validated/concat_worker_info_to_display)" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/repeat_worker/@ids" value="join(' ', instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][@status = 'open'][@owner_id = instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'location_point'][@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/location_id][@category != 'validated']/@case_id)" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/repeat_worker/@count" value="count-selected(/data/repeat_worker/@ids)" />
			<setvalue event="jr-insert" ref="/data/repeat_worker/item/@index" value="int(/data/repeat_worker/@current_index)" />
			<setvalue event="jr-insert" ref="/data/repeat_worker/item/@id" value="selected-at(/data/repeat_worker/@ids, ../@index)" />
			<itext>
				<translation lang="fra" default="">
					<text id="location_information-label">
						<value>Information de Lieu</value>
					</text>
					<text id="campagne_id-label">
						<value>Sélectionner la campagne:</value>
					</text>
					<text id="pas_de_liste_a_valider-label">
						<value>Pas de liste à valider</value>
					</text>
					<text id="pas_de_liste_a_valider/lbl_no_worker_mobile-label">
						<value>Vous n'avez aucune liste a valider. Veuillez quitter le formulaire en suivant les instructions ci-dessous.</value>
						<value form="image">jr://file/commcare/image/data/pas_de_liste_a_valider/lbl_no_worker_mobile-r33ags.png</value>
					</text>
					<text id="pas_de_liste_a_valider/lbl_no_worker_mobile-constraintMsg">
						<value>Veuillez quitter le formulaire en suivant les instructions ci-dessous.</value>
					</text>
					<text id="activity-label">
						<value>Affectation</value>
					</text>
					<text id="activity/worker_category-label">
						<value>Choisir le rôle</value>
					</text>
					<text id="activity/list_worker_present-label">
						<value>Sélectionnez le personnel à valider</value>
					</text>
					<text id="summary-label">
						<value>Résumé</value>
					</text>
					<text id="summary/table_validation-label">
						<value>### Résumé des affectations à valider pour le rôle **<output value="/data/var/worker_role_name" vellum:value="#form/var/worker_role_name" />**

| Rôle | Travailleur | Téléphone | Site |
|:----:|:----:|:----:|:----:|
<output value="/data/var/join_worker_role_info_to_validate" vellum:value="#form/var/join_worker_role_info_to_validate" />

***************************</value>
						<value form="markdown">### Résumé des affectations à valider pour le rôle **<output value="/data/var/worker_role_name" vellum:value="#form/var/worker_role_name" />**

| Rôle | Travailleur | Téléphone | Site |
|:----:|:----:|:----:|:----:|
<output value="/data/var/join_worker_role_info_to_validate" vellum:value="#form/var/join_worker_role_info_to_validate" />

***************************</value>
					</text>
					<text id="summary/validate_workers-label">
						<value>Voulez-vous valider la liste d'acteurs ci-dessus ?</value>
						<value form="markdown">Voulez-vous valider la liste d'acteurs ci-dessus ?</value>
					</text>
					<text id="summary/validate_workers-yes-label">
						<value>Oui</value>
					</text>
					<text id="summary/validate_workers-no-label">
						<value>Non</value>
					</text>
					<text id="summary/summary_rejection-label">
						<value>Résumé - Rejet affectations</value>
					</text>
					<text id="summary/summary_rejection/table_rejection-label">
						<value>### Liste des affectations à rejeter pour le rôle : **<output value="/data/var/worker_role_name" vellum:value="#form/var/worker_role_name" />**

| Rôle | Travailleur | Téléphone | Site |
|:----:|:----:|:----:|:----:|
<output value="/data/var/join_worker_role_info_to_validate" vellum:value="#form/var/join_worker_role_info_to_validate" />

***************************</value>
						<value form="markdown">### Liste des affectations à rejeter pour le rôle : **<output value="/data/var/worker_role_name" vellum:value="#form/var/worker_role_name" />**

| Rôle | Travailleur | Téléphone | Site |
|:----:|:----:|:----:|:----:|
<output value="/data/var/join_worker_role_info_to_validate" vellum:value="#form/var/join_worker_role_info_to_validate" />

***************************</value>
					</text>
					<text id="var-label">
						<value>var for caculations</value>
					</text>
				</translation>
			</itext>
		</model>
	</h:head>
	<h:body>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/location_information" ref="/data/location_information" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('location_information-label')" />
		</group>
		<select1 vellum:ref="#form/campagne_id" ref="/data/campagne_id">
			<label ref="jr:itext('campagne_id-label')" />
			<itemset nodeset="instance('campagnes_label')/campagnes_label_list/campagnes_label">
				<label ref="campagne_label" />
				<value ref="campagne_id" />
			</itemset>
		</select1>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/pas_de_liste_a_valider" ref="/data/pas_de_liste_a_valider" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('pas_de_liste_a_valider-label')" />
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/pas_de_liste_a_valider/lbl_no_worker_mobile" ref="/data/pas_de_liste_a_valider/lbl_no_worker_mobile" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('pas_de_liste_a_valider/lbl_no_worker_mobile-label')" />
				<alert ref="jr:itext('pas_de_liste_a_valider/lbl_no_worker_mobile-constraintMsg')" />
			</trigger>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/activity" ref="/data/activity" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('activity-label')" />
			<select1 vellum:ref="#form/activity/worker_category" ref="/data/activity/worker_category">
				<label ref="jr:itext('activity/worker_category-label')" />
				<itemset nodeset="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'role_to_validate'][index/parent = /data/var/supply_point_id][@state = '1'][@external_id = /data/campagne_id]" vellum:nodeset="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'role_to_validate'][index/parent = #form/var/supply_point_id][@state = '1'][@external_id = #form/campagne_id]">
					<label ref="travailleur_role_nom" />
					<value ref="@category" />
					<sort ref="travailleur_role_nom" />
				</itemset>
			</select1>
			<select vellum:ref="#form/activity/list_worker_present" ref="/data/activity/list_worker_present">
				<label ref="jr:itext('activity/list_worker_present-label')" />
				<itemset nodeset="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][@status = 'open'][@category != 'validated'][@owner_id = instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'location_point'][@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/location_id][campagne_id = /data/activity/campagne_id][travailleur_role = /data/activity/worker_category]" vellum:nodeset="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][@status = 'open'][@category != 'validated'][@owner_id = instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'location_point'][@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/location_id][campagne_id = #form/activity/campagne_id][travailleur_role = #form/activity/worker_category]">
					<label ref="nom_complet" />
					<value ref="@case_id" />
					<sort ref="nom_complet" />
				</itemset>
			</select>
		</group>
		<group>
			<repeat jr:count="/data/repeat_worker/@count" jr:noAddRemove="true()" vellum:nodeset="#form/repeat_worker/item" nodeset="/data/repeat_worker/item">
				<group vellum:ref="#form/repeat_worker/item/display_campaign_category" ref="/data/repeat_worker/item/display_campaign_category">
					<group vellum:ref="#form/repeat_worker/item/display_campaign_category/display_worker_role_validated" ref="/data/repeat_worker/item/display_campaign_category/display_worker_role_validated">
						<group vellum:ref="#form/repeat_worker/item/display_campaign_category/display_worker_role_validated/update_worker_role_to_validate" ref="/data/repeat_worker/item/display_campaign_category/display_worker_role_validated/update_worker_role_to_validate" />
					</group>
					<group vellum:ref="#form/repeat_worker/item/display_campaign_category/display_worker_role_to_reject" ref="/data/repeat_worker/item/display_campaign_category/display_worker_role_to_reject">
						<group vellum:ref="#form/repeat_worker/item/display_campaign_category/display_worker_role_to_reject/delete_worker_role_to_reject" ref="/data/repeat_worker/item/display_campaign_category/display_worker_role_to_reject/delete_worker_role_to_reject" />
					</group>
				</group>
			</repeat>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/summary" ref="/data/summary" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('summary-label')" />
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/summary/table_validation" ref="/data/summary/table_validation" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('summary/table_validation-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<select1 vellum:ref="#form/summary/validate_workers" ref="/data/summary/validate_workers">
				<label ref="jr:itext('summary/validate_workers-label')" />
				<item>
					<label ref="jr:itext('summary/validate_workers-yes-label')" />
					<value>yes</value>
				</item>
				<item>
					<label ref="jr:itext('summary/validate_workers-no-label')" />
					<value>no</value>
				</item>
			</select1>
			<group vellum:ref="#form/summary/summary_rejection" ref="/data/summary/summary_rejection" appearance="field-list">
				<label ref="jr:itext('summary/summary_rejection-label')" />
				<trigger vellum:ref="#form/summary/summary_rejection/table_rejection" ref="/data/summary/summary_rejection/table_rejection" appearance="minimal">
					<label ref="jr:itext('summary/summary_rejection/table_rejection-label')" />
				</trigger>
			</group>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/role_to_validate_update" ref="/data/role_to_validate_update">
			<group vellum:ref="#form/role_to_validate_update/delete_duplicate_role_to_validate_case_if_exists" ref="/data/role_to_validate_update/delete_duplicate_role_to_validate_case_if_exists" />
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/var" ref="/data/var">
			<label ref="jr:itext('var-label')" />
		</group>
	</h:body>
</h:html>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum">
	<h:head>
		<h:title>Valider Fiches de Présence</h:title>
		<model>
			<instance>
				<data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/CC6DFB27-3BCD-4736-99E8-BCB5C5BF0720" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="Valider Fiches de Présence">
					<var>
						<location_id />
						<location_name />
						<location_type />
						<supply_point_id vellum:comment="Get the case id of the supply point which is the supply_point_id of the location where the user is." />
						<count_attendance_caseids />
						<loaded_attendance_caseids />
						<loaded_list_travailleur />
						<sort_list_display_values />
						<add_line_return_list_display_values />
						<list_display_values />
						<date_du_jour />
						<date_validation_format />
						<prev_validation_status />
						<last_attendance_submitted_time_format />
						<pays_id />
						<pays_nom />
						<region_id />
						<region_nom />
						<district_id />
						<district_nom />
						<csi_id />
						<csi_nom />
						<user_role />
						<user_val_step />
						<attendance_validation_caseid />
						<attendance>
							<attendance_location_type_name />
							<attendance_location_name />
							<attendance_location_type />
							<travailleur_role_nom />
							<last_submitted_by />
							<last_count_workers />
						</attendance>
					</var>
					<grp_presence_validation_done>
						<label_already_recorded />
						<flag_quitter />
					</grp_presence_validation_done>
					<informations_fiche_de_presence>
						<attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t />
						<tablea_header />
						<valider_fiche />
					</informations_fiche_de_presence>
					<grp_presence_ko_zero>
						<label_already_recorded />
						<flag_quitter />
					</grp_presence_ko_zero>
					<repreat_attendance jr:template="">
						<repeat_current_position />
						<attendance_caseid />
						<attendance_open />
						<caseid_to_update />
						<workers_number />
						<display>
							<update_attendance_case vellum:case_type="attendance" vellum:role="SaveToCase">
								<case xmlns="http://commcarehq.org/case/transaction/v2" case_id="" date_modified="" user_id="">
									<update>
										<validation />
										<date_validation />
									</update>
								</case>
							</update_attendance_case>
						</display>
					</repreat_attendance>
					<save>
						<validation_status />
						<attendance_validation_step />
						<validation />
						<date_validation />
						<count_attendance_validated />
					</save>
				</data>
			</instance>
			<instance src="jr://instance/session" id="commcaresession" />
			<instance src="jr://instance/casedb" id="casedb" />
			<instance src="jr://fixture/locations" id="locations" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var" nodeset="/data/var" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/location_id" nodeset="/data/var/location_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/location_name" nodeset="/data/var/location_name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/location_type" nodeset="/data/var/location_type" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/location_type" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/supply_point_id" nodeset="/data/var/supply_point_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'location_point'][@owner_id = instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/@owner_id]/@case_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/count_attendance_caseids" nodeset="/data/var/count_attendance_caseids" vellum:calculate="count-selected(#form/var/loaded_attendance_caseids)" calculate="count-selected(/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" nodeset="/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_caseids" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur" nodeset="/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_join_travailleurs_attendance_info" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/sort_list_display_values" nodeset="/data/var/sort_list_display_values" vellum:calculate="if(#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur != "", sort(string(#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur), true()), "")" calculate="if(/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur != "", sort(string(/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur), true()), "")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/add_line_return_list_display_values" nodeset="/data/var/add_line_return_list_display_values" vellum:calculate="replace(#form/var/sort_list_display_values, "@", "
")" calculate="replace(/data/var/sort_list_display_values, "@", "
")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/list_display_values" nodeset="/data/var/list_display_values" vellum:calculate="replace(#form/var/add_line_return_list_display_values, "_", " ")" calculate="replace(/data/var/add_line_return_list_display_values, "_", " ")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/date_du_jour" nodeset="/data/var/date_du_jour" calculate="today()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/date_validation_format" nodeset="/data/var/date_validation_format" vellum:calculate="format-date(date(#case/date_validation), "%e/%m/%Y")" calculate="format-date(date(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/date_validation), "%e/%m/%Y")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/prev_validation_status" nodeset="/data/var/prev_validation_status" vellum:calculate="#case/category" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/category" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/last_attendance_submitted_time_format" nodeset="/data/var/last_attendance_submitted_time_format" calculate="format-date(date(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_submitted_time), "%e/%m/%Y")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/pays_id" nodeset="/data/var/pays_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/pays_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/pays_nom" nodeset="/data/var/pays_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/pays_nom" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/region_id" nodeset="/data/var/region_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@province_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/region_nom" nodeset="/data/var/region_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/var/region_id]/name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/var/region_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/district_id" nodeset="/data/var/district_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@district_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/district_nom" nodeset="/data/var/district_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/var/district_id]/name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/var/district_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/csi_id" nodeset="/data/var/csi_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@centre_sante_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/csi_nom" nodeset="/data/var/csi_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/var/csi_id]/name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/var/csi_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/user_role" nodeset="/data/var/user_role" vellum:calculate="#user/user_role" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/user_role" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/user_val_step" nodeset="/data/var/user_val_step" vellum:calculate="#user/val_step" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/val_step" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/attendance_validation_caseid" nodeset="/data/var/attendance_validation_caseid" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/attendance" nodeset="/data/var/attendance" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/attendance/attendance_location_type_name" nodeset="/data/var/attendance/attendance_location_type_name" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/attendance_location_type_name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/attendance/attendance_location_name" nodeset="/data/var/attendance/attendance_location_name" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/attendance_location_name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/attendance/attendance_location_type" nodeset="/data/var/attendance/attendance_location_type" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/attendance_location_type" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/attendance/travailleur_role_nom" nodeset="/data/var/attendance/travailleur_role_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/travailleur_role_nom" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/attendance/last_submitted_by" nodeset="/data/var/attendance/last_submitted_by" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_submitted_by" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/attendance/last_count_workers" nodeset="/data/var/attendance/last_count_workers" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_count_workers" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_presence_validation_done" nodeset="/data/grp_presence_validation_done" vellum:relevant="#case/category = 1 and instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_count_workers = #case/count_attendance_validated" relevant="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/category = 1 and instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_count_workers = instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/count_attendance_validated" />

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence" nodeset="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence" vellum:relevant="not(#case/category = 1 and instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_count_workers = #case/count_attendance_validated)" relevant="not(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/category = 1 and instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_count_workers = instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/count_attendance_validated)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t" nodeset="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t" />

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded" nodeset="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded" />

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/repreat_attendance" nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance" />

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/repreat_attendance/attendance_open" nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/attendance_open" vellum:calculate="count(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'attendance'][@case_id = #form/repreat_attendance/attendance_caseid])" calculate="count(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'attendance'][@case_id = /data/repreat_attendance/attendance_caseid])" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/repreat_attendance/caseid_to_update" nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/caseid_to_update" vellum:calculate="if(#form/repreat_attendance/attendance_open > 0, #form/repreat_attendance/attendance_caseid, #form/var/attendance_validation_caseid)" calculate="if(/data/repreat_attendance/attendance_open > 0, /data/repreat_attendance/attendance_caseid, /data/var/attendance_validation_caseid)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/repreat_attendance/workers_number" nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/workers_number" vellum:calculate="if(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'attendance'][@case_id = #form/repreat_attendance/attendance_caseid]/validation = "", 1, 0)" calculate="if(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'attendance'][@case_id = /data/repreat_attendance/attendance_caseid]/validation = "", 1, 0)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/repreat_attendance/display" nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/display" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/display/update_attendance_case/case/update/validation" vellum:calculate="#form/save/validation" calculate="/data/save/validation" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/display/update_attendance_case/case/update/date_validation" vellum:calculate="#form/save/date_validation" calculate="/data/save/date_validation" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/display/update_attendance_case/case/@date_modified" calculate="/data/meta/timeEnd" type="xsd:dateTime" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/display/update_attendance_case/case/@user_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/display/update_attendance_case/case/@case_id" vellum:calculate="#form/repreat_attendance/caseid_to_update" calculate="/data/repreat_attendance/caseid_to_update" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/save" nodeset="/data/save" vellum:relevant="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche = 'oui'" relevant="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche = 'oui'" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/save/validation_status" nodeset="/data/save/validation_status" vellum:calculate="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche = 'oui'" calculate="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche = 'oui'" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/save/attendance_validation_step" nodeset="/data/save/attendance_validation_step" vellum:calculate="#form/var/user_val_step + 1" calculate="/data/var/user_val_step + 1" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/save/validation" nodeset="/data/save/validation" vellum:calculate="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche" calculate="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/save/date_validation" nodeset="/data/save/date_validation" vellum:calculate="#form/var/date_du_jour" calculate="/data/var/date_du_jour" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/save/count_attendance_validated" nodeset="/data/save/count_attendance_validated" vellum:calculate="coalesce(#case/count_attendance_validated, 0) + sum(#form/repreat_attendance/workers_number)" calculate="coalesce(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/count_attendance_validated, 0) + sum(/data/repreat_attendance/workers_number)" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" vellum:ref="#form/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" ref="/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_caseids" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" vellum:ref="#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur" ref="/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_join_travailleurs_attendance_info" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" vellum:ref="#form/var/prev_validation_status" ref="/data/var/prev_validation_status" vellum:value="#case/category" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/category" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" vellum:ref="#form/var/user_role" ref="/data/var/user_role" vellum:value="#user/user_role" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/user_role" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" vellum:ref="#form/var/user_val_step" ref="/data/var/user_val_step" vellum:value="#user/val_step" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/val_step" />
			<itext>

	<h:body>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/var" ref="/data/var">
			<label ref="jr:itext('var-label')" />

			<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done-label')" />
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/grp_presence_validation_done/label_already_recorded" ref="/data/grp_presence_validation_done/label_already_recorded" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done/label_already_recorded-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter" ref="/data/grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter-label')" />
				<alert ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter-constraintMsg')" />
			</trigger>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence" ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence-label')" />
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t" ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/tablea_header" ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/tablea_header" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/tablea_header-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<select1 vellum:ref="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche" ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche">
				<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche-label')" />
				<item>
					<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche-oui-label')" />
					<value>oui</value>
				</item>
				<item>
					<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche-non-label')" />
					<value>non</value>
				</item>
			</select1>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/grp_presence_ko_zero" ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero-label')" />
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded" ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter" ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter-label')" />
				<alert ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter-constraintMsg')" />
			</trigger>
		</group>
		<group>
			<label ref="jr:itext('repreat_attendance-label')" />
			<repeat vellum:jr__count="#form/var/count_attendance_caseids" jr:count="/data/var/count_attendance_caseids" jr:noAddRemove="true()" vellum:nodeset="#form/repreat_attendance" nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance">
				<group vellum:ref="#form/repreat_attendance/display" ref="/data/repreat_attendance/display" />
			</repeat>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/save" ref="/data/save">
			<label ref="jr:itext('save-label')" />
		</group>
	</h:body>
</h:html>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum" vellum:ignore="richText">
	<h:head>
		<h:title>Valider Fiches de Présence </h:title>
		<model>
			<instance>
				<data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/1B04E5C2-8A6D-4C92-838F-9B0497A7E2DE" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="Valider Fiches de Présence ">
					<var>
						<location_id />
						<location_name />
						<location_type />
						<supply_point_id vellum:comment="Get the case id of the supply point which is the supply_point_id of the location where the user is." />
						<count_attendance_caseids />
						<loaded_attendance_caseids />
						<loaded_list_travailleur />
						<sort_list_display_values />
						<add_line_return_list_display_values />
						<list_display_values />
						<date_du_jour />
						<date_validation_format />
						<prev_validation_status />
						<last_attendance_submitted_time_format />
						<pays_id />
						<pays_nom />
						<region_id />
						<region_nom />
						<district_id />
						<district_nom />
						<csi_id />
						<csi_nom />
						<user_role />
						<user_val_step />
						<attendance_validation_caseid />
					</var>
					<grp_presence_validation_done>
						<label_already_recorded />
						<flag_quitter />
					</grp_presence_validation_done>
					<informations_fiche_de_presence>
						<attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t />
						<tablea_header />
						<valider_fiche />
					</informations_fiche_de_presence>
					<grp_presence_ko_zero>
						<label_already_recorded />
						<flag_quitter />
					</grp_presence_ko_zero>
					<repreat_attendance jr:template="">
						<repeat_current_position />
						<attendance_caseid />
						<attendance_open />
						<caseid_to_update />
						<workers_number />
						<display>
							<update_attendance_case vellum:case_type="attendance" vellum:role="SaveToCase">
								<case xmlns="http://commcarehq.org/case/transaction/v2" case_id="" date_modified="" user_id="">
									<update>
										<validation />
										<date_validation />
									</update>
								</case>
							</update_attendance_case>
						</display>
					</repreat_attendance>
					<save>
						<validation_status />
						<attendance_validation_step />
						<validation />
						<date_validation />
						<count_attendance_validated />
					</save>
				</data>
			</instance>
			<instance src="jr://instance/session" id="commcaresession" />
			<instance src="jr://instance/casedb" id="casedb" />
			<instance src="jr://fixture/locations" id="locations" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/location_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/location_name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/name" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/location_type" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/location_type" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/supply_point_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'location_point'][@owner_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@case_id" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/count_attendance_caseids" calculate="count-selected(/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids)" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_caseids" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_join_travailleurs_attendance_info" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/sort_list_display_values" calculate="if(/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur != "", sort(string(/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur), true()), "")" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/add_line_return_list_display_values" calculate="replace(/data/var/sort_list_display_values, "@", "
")" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/list_display_values" calculate="replace(/data/var/add_line_return_list_display_values, "_", " ")" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/date_du_jour" calculate="today()" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/date_validation_format" calculate="format-date(date(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/date_validation), "%e/%m/%Y")" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/prev_validation_status" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/category" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/last_attendance_submitted_time_format" calculate="format-date(date(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_submitted_time), "%e/%m/%Y")" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/pays_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/pays_id" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/pays_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/pays_nom" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/region_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/region_id" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/region_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/region_nom" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/district_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/district_id" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/district_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/district_nom" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/csi_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/csi_id" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/csi_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/sci_nom" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/user_role" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/user_role" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/user_val_step" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/val_step" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/attendance_validation_caseid" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/grp_presence_validation_done" relevant="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/category = 1 and instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_count_workers = instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/count_attendance_validated" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/grp_presence_validation_done/label_already_recorded" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter" constraint="1 = 2" jr:constraintMsg="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter-constraintMsg')" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence" relevant="not(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/category = 1 and instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_count_workers = instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/count_attendance_validated)" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/tablea_header" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche" required="true()" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero" relevant="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche = 'non'" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter" constraint="1 = 2" jr:constraintMsg="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter-constraintMsg')" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/repeat_current_position" calculate="position(..)" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/attendance_caseid" calculate="selected-at(/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids, /data/repreat_attendance/repeat_current_position)" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/attendance_open" calculate="count(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'attendance'][@case_id = /data/repreat_attendance/attendance_caseid])" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/caseid_to_update" calculate="if(/data/repreat_attendance/attendance_open > 0, /data/repreat_attendance/attendance_caseid, /data/var/attendance_validation_caseid)" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/workers_number" calculate="if(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'attendance'][@case_id = /data/repreat_attendance/attendance_caseid]/validation = '', 1, 0)" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/display" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/display/update_attendance_case/case/update/validation" calculate="/data/save/validation" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/display/update_attendance_case/case/update/date_validation" calculate="/data/save/date_validation" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/display/update_attendance_case/case/@date_modified" calculate="/data/meta/timeEnd" type="xsd:dateTime" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/display/update_attendance_case/case/@user_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/display/update_attendance_case/case/@case_id" calculate="/data/repreat_attendance/caseid_to_update" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/save" relevant="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche = 'oui'" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/save/validation_status" calculate="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche = 'oui'" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/save/attendance_validation_step" calculate="/data/var/user_val_step + 1" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/save/validation" calculate="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/save/date_validation" calculate="/data/var/date_du_jour" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/save/count_attendance_validated" calculate="coalesce(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/count_attendance_validated, 0) + sum(/data/repreat_attendance/workers_number)" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_caseids" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_join_travailleurs_attendance_info" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/var/prev_validation_status" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/category" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/var/user_role" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/user_role" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/var/user_val_step" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/val_step" />
			<itext>
				<translation lang="fra" default="">

	<h:body>
		<group ref="/data/var">
			<label ref="jr:itext('var-label')" />
		</group>
		<group ref="/data/grp_presence_validation_done" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done-label')" />
			<trigger ref="/data/grp_presence_validation_done/label_already_recorded" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done/label_already_recorded-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<trigger ref="/data/grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter-label')" />
				<alert ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter-constraintMsg')" />
			</trigger>
		</group>
		<group ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence-label')" />
			<trigger ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<trigger ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/tablea_header" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/tablea_header-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<select1 ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche">
				<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche-label')" />
				<item>
					<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche-oui-label')" />
					<value>oui</value>
				</item>
				<item>
					<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche-non-label')" />
					<value>non</value>
				</item>
			</select1>
		</group>
		<group ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero-label')" />
			<trigger ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<trigger ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter-label')" />
				<alert ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter-constraintMsg')" />
			</trigger>
		</group>
		<group>
			<label ref="jr:itext('repreat_attendance-label')" />
			<repeat jr:count="/data/var/count_attendance_caseids" jr:noAddRemove="true()" nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance">
				<group ref="/data/repreat_attendance/display" />
			</repeat>
		</group>
		<group ref="/data/save">
			<label ref="jr:itext('save-label')" />
		</group>
	</h:body>
</h:html>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum" vellum:ignore="richText">
	<h:head>
		<h:title>Valider Fiches de Présence</h:title>
		<model>
			<instance>
				<data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/8DEBF97B-6B9B-4561-8725-EA9415CCE40A" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="Valider Fiches de Présence">
					<var>
						<location_id />
						<location_name />
						<location_type />
						<supply_point_id vellum:comment="Get the case id of the supply point which is the supply_point_id of the location where the user is." />
						<count_attendance_caseids />
						<loaded_attendance_caseids />
						<loaded_list_travailleur />
						<sort_list_display_values />
						<add_line_return_list_display_values />
						<list_display_values />
						<date_du_jour />
						<date_validation_format />
						<prev_validation_status />
						<last_attendance_submitted_time_format />
						<pays_id />
						<pays_nom />
						<region_id />
						<region_nom />
						<district_id />
						<district_nom />
						<csi_id />
						<csi_nom />
						<user_role />
						<user_val_step />
						<attendance_validation_caseid />
					</var>
					<grp_presence_validation_done>
						<label_already_recorded />
						<flag_quitter />
					</grp_presence_validation_done>
					<informations_fiche_de_presence>
						<attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t />
						<tablea_header />
						<valider_fiche />
					</informations_fiche_de_presence>
					<grp_presence_ko_zero>
						<label_already_recorded />
						<flag_quitter />
					</grp_presence_ko_zero>
					<repreat_attendance jr:template="">
						<repeat_current_position />
						<attendance_caseid />
						<attendance_open />
						<caseid_to_update />
						<workers_number />
						<display>
							<update_attendance_case vellum:case_type="attendance" vellum:role="SaveToCase">
								<case xmlns="http://commcarehq.org/case/transaction/v2" case_id="" date_modified="" user_id="">
									<update>
										<validation />
										<date_validation />
									</update>
								</case>
							</update_attendance_case>
						</display>
					</repreat_attendance>
					<save>
						<validation_status />
						<attendance_validation_step />
						<validation />
						<date_validation />
						<count_attendance_validated />
					</save>
				</data>
			</instance>
			<instance src="jr://instance/session" id="commcaresession" />
			<instance src="jr://instance/casedb" id="casedb" />
			<instance src="jr://fixture/locations" id="locations" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/location_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/location_name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/name" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/location_type" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/location_type" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/supply_point_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'location_point'][@owner_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@case_id" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/count_attendance_caseids" calculate="count-selected(/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids)" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_caseids" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_join_travailleurs_attendance_info" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/sort_list_display_values" calculate="if(/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur != "", sort(string(/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur), true()), "")" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/add_line_return_list_display_values" calculate="replace(/data/var/sort_list_display_values, "@", "
")" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/list_display_values" calculate="replace(/data/var/add_line_return_list_display_values, "_", " ")" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/date_du_jour" calculate="today()" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/date_validation_format" calculate="format-date(date(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/date_validation), "%e/%m/%Y")" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/prev_validation_status" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/category" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/last_attendance_submitted_time_format" calculate="format-date(date(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_submitted_time), "%e/%m/%Y")" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/pays_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/pays_id" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/pays_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/pays_nom" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/region_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/region_id" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/region_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/region_nom" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/district_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/district_id" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/district_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/district_nom" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/csi_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/csi_id" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/csi_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/csi_nom" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/user_role" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/user_role" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/user_val_step" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/val_step" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/var/attendance_validation_caseid" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/grp_presence_validation_done" relevant="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/category = 1 and instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_count_workers = instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/count_attendance_validated" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/grp_presence_validation_done/label_already_recorded" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter" constraint="1 = 2" jr:constraintMsg="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter-constraintMsg')" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence" relevant="not(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/category = 1 and instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_count_workers = instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/count_attendance_validated)" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/tablea_header" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche" required="true()" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero" relevant="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche = 'non'" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter" constraint="1 = 2" jr:constraintMsg="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter-constraintMsg')" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/repeat_current_position" calculate="position(..)" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/attendance_caseid" calculate="selected-at(/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids, /data/repreat_attendance/repeat_current_position)" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/attendance_open" calculate="count(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'attendance'][@case_id = /data/repreat_attendance/attendance_caseid])" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/caseid_to_update" calculate="if(/data/repreat_attendance/attendance_open > 0, /data/repreat_attendance/attendance_caseid, /data/var/attendance_validation_caseid)" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/workers_number" calculate="if(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'attendance'][@case_id = /data/repreat_attendance/attendance_caseid]/validation = '', 1, 0)" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/display" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/display/update_attendance_case/case/update/validation" calculate="/data/save/validation" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/display/update_attendance_case/case/update/date_validation" calculate="/data/save/date_validation" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/display/update_attendance_case/case/@date_modified" calculate="/data/meta/timeEnd" type="xsd:dateTime" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/display/update_attendance_case/case/@user_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance/display/update_attendance_case/case/@case_id" calculate="/data/repreat_attendance/caseid_to_update" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/save" relevant="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche = 'oui'" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/save/validation_status" calculate="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche = 'oui'" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/save/attendance_validation_step" calculate="/data/var/user_val_step + 1" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/save/validation" calculate="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/save/date_validation" calculate="/data/var/date_du_jour" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/save/count_attendance_validated" calculate="coalesce(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/count_attendance_validated, 0) + sum(/data/repreat_attendance/workers_number)" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_caseids" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_join_travailleurs_attendance_info" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/var/prev_validation_status" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/category" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/var/user_role" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/user_role" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/var/user_val_step" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/val_step" />
			<itext>
				<translation lang="fra" default="">
					<text id="var-label">
						<value>variables</value>
					</text>
					<text id="grp_presence_validation_done-label">
						<value>Validation Fiche de Présence</value>
					</text>
					<text id="grp_presence_validation_done/label_already_recorded-label">
						<value>#### Vous avez déjà validé la fiche de présence</value>
						<value form="markdown">#### Vous avez déjà validé la fiche de présence</value>
					</text>
					<text id="grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter-label">
						<value>Veuillez quitter le formulaire.</value>
						<value form="image">jr://file/commcare/image/data/grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter-bpn03b.png</value>
					</text>
					<text id="grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter-constraintMsg">
						<value>Veuillez quitter le formulaire.</value>
					</text>
					<text id="informations_fiche_de_presence-label">
						<value>Informations Fiche de Présence</value>
					</text>
					<text id="informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t-label">

* Nombre de travailleurs: **<output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_count_workers" />**

			<trigger ref="/data/grp_presence_validation_done/label_already_recorded" appearance="minimal">

				<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/tablea_header-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<select1 ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche">
				<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche-label')" />

					<value>oui</value>
				</item>
				<item>
					<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche-non-label')" />
					<value>non</value>
				</item>
			</select1>
		</group>
		<group ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero-label')" />
			<trigger ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<trigger ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter-label')" />
				<alert ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter-constraintMsg')" />
			</trigger>
		</group>
		<group>
			<label ref="jr:itext('repreat_attendance-label')" />
			<repeat jr:count="/data/var/count_attendance_caseids" jr:noAddRemove="true()" nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance">
				<group ref="/data/repreat_attendance/display" />
			</repeat>
		</group>
		<group ref="/data/save">
			<label ref="jr:itext('save-label')" />
		</group>
	</h:body>
</h:html>

	<h:head>

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var" nodeset="/data/var" />

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/supply_point_id" nodeset="/data/var/supply_point_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/supply_point_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/count_attendance_caseids" nodeset="/data/var/count_attendance_caseids" vellum:calculate="count-selected(#form/var/loaded_attendance_caseids)" calculate="count-selected(/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" nodeset="/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" vellum:calculate="#case/last_attendance_caseids" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_caseids" />

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/sort_list_display_values" nodeset="/data/var/sort_list_display_values" vellum:calculate="if(#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur != "", sort(string(#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur), true()), "")" calculate="if(/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur != "", sort(string(/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur), true()), "")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/add_line_return_list_display_values" nodeset="/data/var/add_line_return_list_display_values" vellum:calculate="replace(#form/var/sort_list_display_values, "@", "
")" calculate="replace(/data/var/sort_list_display_values, "@", "
")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/list_display_values" nodeset="/data/var/list_display_values" vellum:calculate="replace(#form/var/add_line_return_list_display_values, "_", " ")" calculate="replace(/data/var/add_line_return_list_display_values, "_", " ")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/date_du_jour" nodeset="/data/var/date_du_jour" calculate="today()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/date_validation_format" nodeset="/data/var/date_validation_format" vellum:calculate="format-date(date(#case/date_validation), "%e/%m/%Y")" calculate="format-date(date(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/date_validation), "%e/%m/%Y")" />

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/last_attendance_submitted_time_format" nodeset="/data/var/last_attendance_submitted_time_format" vellum:calculate="format-date(date(#case/last_attendance_submitted_time), "%e/%m/%Y")" calculate="format-date(date(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_submitted_time), "%e/%m/%Y")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/pays_id" nodeset="/data/var/pays_id" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/var/location_id]/@pays_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/var/location_id]/@pays_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/pays_nom" nodeset="/data/var/pays_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/var/location_id]/@pays_nom" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/var/location_id]/@pays_nom" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/region_id" nodeset="/data/var/region_id" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/var/location_id]/@province_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/var/location_id]/@province_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/region_nom" nodeset="/data/var/region_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/var/location_id]/@province_nom" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/var/location_id]/@province_nom" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/district_id" nodeset="/data/var/district_id" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/var/location_id]/@district_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/var/location_id]/@district_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/district_nom" nodeset="/data/var/district_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/var/location_id]/@district_nom" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/var/location_id]/@district_nom" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/csi_id" nodeset="/data/var/csi_id" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/var/location_id]/@centre_sante_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/var/location_id]/@centre_sante_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/csi_nom" nodeset="/data/var/csi_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/var/location_id]/@centre_sante_nom" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/var/location_id]/@centre_sante_nom" />

	<h:head>

					<var>
						<location_id />

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var" nodeset="/data/var" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/location_id" nodeset="/data/var/location_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id" />

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/supply_point_id" nodeset="/data/var/supply_point_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/supply_point_id" />

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" nodeset="/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" vellum:calculate="#case/last_attendance_caseids" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_caseids" />

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/sort_list_display_values" nodeset="/data/var/sort_list_display_values" vellum:calculate="if(#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur != "", sort(string(#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur), true()), "")" calculate="if(/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur != "", sort(string(/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur), true()), "")" />

")" calculate="replace(/data/var/sort_list_display_values, "@", "
")" />

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/region_nom" nodeset="/data/var/region_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/var/location_id]/@region_nom" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/var/location_id]/@region_nom" />
