<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum">
	<h:head>
		<h:title>Statut des Fiches de Présence</h:title>
		<model>
			<instance>
				<data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/C4B2603B-3206-4BBE-A49E-DD6EB84FD488" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="Statut des Fiches de Présence">
					<var>
						<location_id />
						<location_name />
						<location_type />
						<supply_point_id vellum:comment="Get the case id of the supply point which is the supply_point_id of the location where the user is." />
						<count_attendance_caseids />
						<loaded_attendance_caseids />
						<loaded_list_travailleur />
						<sort_list_display_values />
						<add_line_return_list_display_values />
						<list_display_values />
						<date_du_jour />
						<date_validation_format />
						<prev_validation_status />
						<last_attendance_submitted_time_format />
						<pays_id />
						<pays_nom />
						<region_id />
						<region_nom />
						<user_role />
						<user_val_step />
					</var>
					<informations_fiche_de_presence>
						<attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t />
						<tablea_header />
					</informations_fiche_de_presence>
				</data>
			</instance>
			<instance src="jr://instance/session" id="commcaresession" />
			<instance src="jr://fixture/locations" id="locations" />
			<instance src="jr://instance/casedb" id="casedb" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var" nodeset="/data/var" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/location_id" nodeset="/data/var/location_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/location_name" nodeset="/data/var/location_name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/location_type" nodeset="/data/var/location_type" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/location_type" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/supply_point_id" nodeset="/data/var/supply_point_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/supply_point_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/count_attendance_caseids" nodeset="/data/var/count_attendance_caseids" vellum:calculate="count-selected(#form/var/loaded_attendance_caseids)" calculate="count-selected(/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" nodeset="/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" vellum:calculate="#case/last_attendance_caseids" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_caseids" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur" nodeset="/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur" vellum:calculate="#case/last_join_travailleurs_attendance_info" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_join_travailleurs_attendance_info" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/sort_list_display_values" nodeset="/data/var/sort_list_display_values" vellum:calculate="if(#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur != "", sort(string(#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur), true()), "")" calculate="if(/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur != "", sort(string(/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur), true()), "")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/add_line_return_list_display_values" nodeset="/data/var/add_line_return_list_display_values" vellum:calculate="replace(#form/var/sort_list_display_values, "@", "
")" calculate="replace(/data/var/sort_list_display_values, "@", "
")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/list_display_values" nodeset="/data/var/list_display_values" vellum:calculate="replace(#form/var/add_line_return_list_display_values, "_", " ")" calculate="replace(/data/var/add_line_return_list_display_values, "_", " ")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/date_du_jour" nodeset="/data/var/date_du_jour" calculate="today()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/date_validation_format" nodeset="/data/var/date_validation_format" vellum:calculate="format-date(date(#case/date_validation), "%e/%m/%Y")" calculate="format-date(date(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/date_validation), "%e/%m/%Y")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/prev_validation_status" nodeset="/data/var/prev_validation_status" vellum:calculate="#case/category" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/category" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/last_attendance_submitted_time_format" nodeset="/data/var/last_attendance_submitted_time_format" vellum:calculate="format-date(date(#case/last_attendance_submitted_time), "%e/%m/%Y")" calculate="format-date(date(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_submitted_time), "%e/%m/%Y")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/pays_id" nodeset="/data/var/pays_id" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/var/location_id]/@central_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/var/location_id]/@central_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/pays_nom" nodeset="/data/var/pays_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/var/location_id]/@central_nom" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/var/location_id]/@central_nom" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/region_id" nodeset="/data/var/region_id" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/var/location_id]/@region_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/var/location_id]/@region_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/region_nom" nodeset="/data/var/region_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/var/location_id]/@region_nom" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/var/location_id]/@region_nom" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/user_role" nodeset="/data/var/user_role" vellum:calculate="#user/user_role" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/user_role" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/user_val_step" nodeset="/data/var/user_val_step" vellum:calculate="#user/val_step" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/val_step" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence" nodeset="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t" nodeset="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/tablea_header" nodeset="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/tablea_header" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" vellum:ref="#form/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" ref="/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" vellum:value="#case/last_attendance_caseids" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_caseids" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" vellum:ref="#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur" ref="/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur" vellum:value="#case/last_join_travailleurs_attendance_info" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_join_travailleurs_attendance_info" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" vellum:ref="#form/var/prev_validation_status" ref="/data/var/prev_validation_status" vellum:value="#case/category" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/category" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" vellum:ref="#form/var/user_role" ref="/data/var/user_role" vellum:value="#user/user_role" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/user_role" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" vellum:ref="#form/var/user_val_step" ref="/data/var/user_val_step" vellum:value="#user/val_step" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/val_step" />

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum">
	<h:head>
		<h:title>Statut KYC</h:title>
		<model>
			<instance>
				<data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/F51C7A5B-66C6-4C6F-A2E8-729040A8932D" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="Statut KYC">
					<kyc_status_check />
					<kyc_comment />
					<informations_de_lacteur>
						<informations_acteur />
						<lbl_kyc_encours />
						<lbl_kyc_ok />
						<lbl_kyc_non_ok />
						<lbl_kyc_ko />
					</informations_de_lacteur>
				</data>
			</instance>
			<instance src="jr://instance/casedb" id="casedb" />
			<instance src="jr://instance/session" id="commcaresession" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/kyc_status_check" nodeset="/data/kyc_status_check" vellum:calculate="cond(#case/kyc_status = 'OK', 'Validé', #case/kyc_status = 'KO', 'Rejeté', #case/kyc_status = 'NO ACCOUNT', 'Pas de compte Mobile Money', 'En cours de vérification')" calculate="cond(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/kyc_status = 'OK', 'Validé', instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/kyc_status = 'KO', 'Rejeté', instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/kyc_status = 'NO ACCOUNT', 'Pas de compte Mobile Money', 'En cours de vérification')" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/kyc_comment" nodeset="/data/kyc_comment" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_de_lacteur" nodeset="/data/informations_de_lacteur" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_de_lacteur/informations_acteur" nodeset="/data/informations_de_lacteur/informations_acteur" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_encours" nodeset="/data/informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_encours" vellum:relevant="#case/kyc_status = ''" relevant="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/kyc_status = ''" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_ok" nodeset="/data/informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_ok" vellum:relevant="#case/kyc_status = 'OK'" relevant="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/kyc_status = 'OK'" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_non_ok" nodeset="/data/informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_non_ok" vellum:relevant="#case/kyc_status != 'OK'" relevant="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/kyc_status != 'OK'" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_ko" nodeset="/data/informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_ko" vellum:relevant="#case/kyc_status = 'KO' and false()" relevant="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/kyc_status = 'KO' and false()" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" vellum:ref="#form/kyc_comment" ref="/data/kyc_comment" vellum:value="#case/kyc_comment" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/kyc_comment" />
			<itext>
				<translation lang="fra" default="">
					<text id="informations_de_lacteur-label">
						<value>Informations de l'acteur</value>
					</text>
					<text id="informations_de_lacteur/informations_acteur-label">
						<value>### Informations

| Rubriques | Informations |
| --- | --- |
| Nom de l'acteur | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/nom_complet" vellum:value="#case/nom_complet" /> |
| Date de naissance | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/date_de_naissance" vellum:value="#case/date_de_naissance" /> |
| Pièce d'identité | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/nin_id" vellum:value="#case/nin_id" /> |
| Téléphone | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/telephone_mm" vellum:value="#case/telephone_mm" /> |
| Statut KYC | <output value="/data/kyc_status_check" vellum:value="#form/kyc_status_check" /> |

***************************
</value>
						<value form="markdown">### Informations

| Rubriques | Informations |
| --- | --- |
| Nom de l'acteur | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/nom_complet" vellum:value="#case/nom_complet" /> |
| Date de naissance | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/date_de_naissance" vellum:value="#case/date_de_naissance" /> |
| Pièce d'identité | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/nin_id" vellum:value="#case/nin_id" /> |
| Téléphone | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/telephone_mm" vellum:value="#case/telephone_mm" /> |
| Statut KYC | <output value="/data/kyc_status_check" vellum:value="#form/kyc_status_check" /> |

***************************
</value>
					</text>
					<text id="informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_encours-label">
						<value>Le numéro de téléphone est en cours de validation.
Revenez plus tard pour plus d'informations.</value>
					</text>
					<text id="informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_ok-label">
						<value>Le numéro de téléphone a été vérifié et validé.
Vous pouvez maintenant affecter cet acteur à un rôle.</value>
					</text>
					<text id="informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_non_ok-label">
						<value><output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/kyc_comment" vellum:value="#case/kyc_comment" /> </value>
					</text>
					<text id="informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_ko-label">
						<value>Le numéro de téléphone ne correspond pas au nom enregistré. Si tel est le cas, veuillez vous rapprocher de votre opérateur pour résoudre ce problème.</value>
					</text>
				</translation>
			</itext>
		</model>
		<vellum:hashtags>{"#case/kyc_status":null,"#case/nom_complet":null,"#case/date_de_naissance":null,"#case/nin_id":null,"#case/case_name":null,"#case/telephone_mm":null,"#case/kyc_comment":null}</vellum:hashtags>
		<vellum:hashtagTransforms>{"prefixes":{"#case/":"instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/","#user/":"instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/"}}</vellum:hashtagTransforms>
	</h:head>
	<h:body>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/informations_de_lacteur" ref="/data/informations_de_lacteur" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('informations_de_lacteur-label')" />
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/informations_de_lacteur/informations_acteur" ref="/data/informations_de_lacteur/informations_acteur" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('informations_de_lacteur/informations_acteur-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_encours" ref="/data/informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_encours" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_encours-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_ok" ref="/data/informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_ok" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_ok-label')" />
			</trigger>

<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum">
  <h:head>
    <h:title>[Caché] Réaffectation</h:title>
    <model>
      <instance>
        <data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/0A4AE85A-DD6A-4820-93CD-67263E07669C" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="[Caché] Réaffectation">
          <informations_gographiques>
            <location_id/>
            <supply_point_id vellum:comment="Get the case id of the supply point which is the supply_point_id of the location where the user is."/>
            <location_type/>
            <location_type_name/>
            <pays_virtuel/>
            <central_code/>
            <central_id/>
            <central_nom/>
            <central_numero/>
            <departement_id/>
            <departement_nom/>
            <zone_id/>
            <zone_nom/>
            <commune_id/>
            <commune_nom/>
            <fosa_id/>
            <fosa_nom/>
          </informations_gographiques>
          <select_worker>
            <selection_acteurs/>
            <number_of_workers/>
            <repeat jr:template="">
              <position/>
              <travailleur_id/>
              <display>
                <travailleur_nin_id/>
                <travailleur_date_naissance/>
                <travailleur_nom_complet/>
                <travailleur_telephone_mm/>
                <travailleur_infos/>
                <relocation_request/>
                <relocate_travailleur_code/>
                <case_management>
                  <relocate_worker_case>
                    <update_worker_case vellum:case_type="travailleur_nouveau" vellum:role="SaveToCase">
                      <case xmlns="http://commcarehq.org/case/transaction/v2" case_id="" date_modified="" user_id="">
                        <update>
                          <owner_id/>
                          <departement_code_final/>
                          <zone_code_final/>
                          <commune_code_final/>
                          <fosa_code_final/>
                          <relocation_request/>
                          <relocate_travailleur_code/>
                        </update>
                      </case>
                    </update_worker_case>
                  </relocate_worker_case>
                </case_management>
              </display>
            </repeat>
            <join_travailleur_infos/>
          </select_worker>
          <select_the_location>
            <departement/>
            <zone/>
            <commune/>
            <fosa/>
            <departement_nom_final/>
            <departement_code_final/>
            <zone_nom_final/>
            <zone_code_final/>
            <commune_nom_final/>
            <commune_code_final/>
            <fosa_nom_final/>
            <fosa_code_final/>
          </select_the_location>
          <resume>
            <locations_infos/>
          </resume>
          <confirm_form_usage/>
        </data>
      </instance>
      <instance src="jr://instance/session" id="commcaresession"/>
      <instance src="jr://fixture/locations" id="locations"/>
      <instance src="jr://instance/casedb" id="casedb"/>

      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques/location_type" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques/location_type" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@type"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques/location_type_name" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques/location_type_name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/location_type"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques/pays_virtuel" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques/pays_virtuel" calculate="selected-at(instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_ids, 1)"/>

      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques/central_id" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques/central_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@central_id"/>

      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques/departement_nom" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques/departement_nom" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@departement_id]/name"/>

      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques/zone_nom" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques/zone_nom" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@zone_id]/name"/>

      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/select_worker/repeat/display" nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/display" vellum:relevant="#form/select_worker/repeat/position + 1 <= #form/select_worker/number_of_workers" relevant="/data/select_worker/repeat/position + 1 <= /data/select_worker/number_of_workers"/>

        <translation lang="en">
          <text id="informations_gographiques-label">

          <text id="select_worker/selection_acteurs-label">
            <value>Sélection Acteurs</value>

          </text>
          <text id="select_the_location/fosa-label">

          </text>

          <text id="resume/locations_infos-label">
            <value>**RESUME SUR L'EMPLACEMENT DE(S) TRAVAILLEUR(S)**

Ces travailleurs seront déplacées de :

| ----------- | ----------- | ----------- |
| Département    |  <output value="/data/informations_gographiques/departement_nom" vellum:value="#form/informations_gographiques/departement_nom"/> | <output value="/data/select_the_location/departement_nom_final" vellum:value="#form/select_the_location/departement_nom_final"/>     |
| Zone sanitaire  | <output value="/data/informations_gographiques/zone_nom" vellum:value="#form/informations_gographiques/zone_nom"/>  | <output value="/data/select_the_location/zone_nom_final" vellum:value="#form/select_the_location/zone_nom_final"/>  |
| Commune  | <output value="/data/informations_gographiques/commune_nom" vellum:value="#form/informations_gographiques/commune_nom"/>   | <output value="/data/select_the_location/commune_nom_final" vellum:value="#form/select_the_location/commune_nom_final"/>  |
| Formation Sanitaire  | <output value="/data/informations_gographiques/fosa_nom" vellum:value="#form/informations_gographiques/fosa_nom"/>  | <output value="/data/select_the_location/fosa_nom_final" vellum:value="#form/select_the_location/fosa_nom_final"/>  |
</value>
            <value form="markdown">**RESUME SUR L'EMPLACEMENT DE(S) TRAVAILLEUR(S)**

| Département    |  <output value="/data/informations_gographiques/departement_nom" vellum:value="#form/informations_gographiques/departement_nom"/> | <output value="/data/select_the_location/departement_nom_final" vellum:value="#form/select_the_location/departement_nom_final"/>     |
| Zone sanitaire  | <output value="/data/informations_gographiques/zone_nom" vellum:value="#form/informations_gographiques/zone_nom"/>  | <output value="/data/select_the_location/zone_nom_final" vellum:value="#form/select_the_location/zone_nom_final"/>  |

| Formation Sanitaire  | <output value="/data/informations_gographiques/fosa_nom" vellum:value="#form/informations_gographiques/fosa_nom"/>  | <output value="/data/select_the_location/fosa_nom_final" vellum:value="#form/select_the_location/fosa_nom_final"/>  |

          <text id="confirm_form_usage-oui-label">

            <value>Non</value>

    </model>
  </h:head>
  <h:body>
    <group vellum:ref="#form/informations_gographiques" ref="/data/informations_gographiques" appearance="field-list">
      <label ref="jr:itext('informations_gographiques-label')"/>
    </group>
    <group vellum:ref="#form/select_worker" ref="/data/select_worker" appearance="field-list">
      <label ref="jr:itext('select_worker-label')"/>
      <select vellum:ref="#form/select_worker/selection_acteurs" ref="/data/select_worker/selection_acteurs" appearance="combobox">
        <label ref="jr:itext('select_worker/selection_acteurs-label')"/>
        <itemset nodeset="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_nouveau'][@status = 'open'][@owner_id = /data/informations_gographiques/location_id]" vellum:nodeset="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_nouveau'][@status = 'open'][@owner_id = #form/informations_gographiques/location_id]">
          <label ref="nom_unique"/>
          <value ref="@case_id"/>
          <sort ref="nom_unique"/>
        </itemset>
      </select>
      <group>
        <repeat vellum:jr__count="#form/select_worker/number_of_workers" jr:count="/data/select_worker/number_of_workers" jr:noAddRemove="true()" vellum:nodeset="#form/select_worker/repeat" nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat">
          <group vellum:ref="#form/select_worker/repeat/display" ref="/data/select_worker/repeat/display" appearance="field-list">
            <group vellum:ref="#form/select_worker/repeat/display/case_management" ref="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/case_management">
              <group vellum:ref="#form/select_worker/repeat/display/case_management/relocate_worker_case" ref="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/case_management/relocate_worker_case"/>
            </group>
          </group>
        </repeat>
      </group>
    </group>
    <group vellum:ref="#form/select_the_location" ref="/data/select_the_location" appearance="field-list">
      <label ref="jr:itext('select_the_location-label')"/>
      <select1 vellum:ref="#form/select_the_location/departement" ref="/data/select_the_location/departement" appearance="combobox">
        <label ref="jr:itext('select_the_location/departement-label')"/>
        <itemset nodeset="instance('locations')/locations/location[@type = "departement"][@central != /data/informations_gographiques/central_id]" vellum:nodeset="instance('locations')/locations/location[@type = "departement"][@central != #form/informations_gographiques/central_id]">
          <label ref="name"/>
          <value ref="@id"/>
          <sort ref="name"/>
        </itemset>
      </select1>
      <select1 vellum:ref="#form/select_the_location/zone" ref="/data/select_the_location/zone" appearance="combobox">
        <label ref="jr:itext('select_the_location/zone-label')"/>
        <itemset nodeset="instance('locations')/locations/location[@type = "zone"][@departement_id = /data/select_the_location/departement]" vellum:nodeset="instance('locations')/locations/location[@type = "zone"][@departement_id = #form/select_the_location/departement]">
          <label ref="name"/>
          <value ref="@id"/>
          <sort ref="name"/>
        </itemset>
      </select1>
      <select1 vellum:ref="#form/select_the_location/commune" ref="/data/select_the_location/commune" appearance="combobox">
        <label ref="jr:itext('select_the_location/commune-label')"/>
        <itemset nodeset="instance('locations')/locations/location[@type = "commune"][@zone_id = /data/select_the_location/zone]" vellum:nodeset="instance('locations')/locations/location[@type = "commune"][@zone_id = #form/select_the_location/zone]">
          <label ref="name"/>
          <value ref="@id"/>
          <sort ref="name"/>
        </itemset>
      </select1>
      <select1 vellum:ref="#form/select_the_location/fosa" ref="/data/select_the_location/fosa" appearance="combobox">
        <label ref="jr:itext('select_the_location/fosa-label')"/>
        <itemset nodeset="instance('locations')/locations/location[@type = "fosa"][@commune_id = /data/select_the_location/commune]" vellum:nodeset="instance('locations')/locations/location[@type = "fosa"][@commune_id = #form/select_the_location/commune]">
          <label ref="name"/>
          <value ref="@id"/>
          <sort ref="name"/>
        </itemset>
      </select1>
    </group>
    <group vellum:ref="#form/resume" ref="/data/resume" appearance="field-list">
      <label ref="jr:itext('resume-label')"/>
      <trigger vellum:ref="#form/resume/locations_infos" ref="/data/resume/locations_infos" appearance="minimal">
        <label ref="jr:itext('resume/locations_infos-label')"/>
      </trigger>
    </group>
    <select1 vellum:ref="#form/confirm_form_usage" ref="/data/confirm_form_usage">
      <label ref="jr:itext('confirm_form_usage-label')"/>
      <item>
        <label ref="jr:itext('confirm_form_usage-oui-label')"/>
        <value>oui</value>
      </item>
      <item>
        <label ref="jr:itext('confirm_form_usage-non-label')"/>
        <value>non</value>
      </item>
    </select1>
  </h:body>
</h:html>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum">
	<h:head>
		<h:title>Déplacer un acteur</h:title>
		<model>
			<instance>
				<data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/F69B7F28-3D16-4989-9087-41EB9D4292CC" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="Déplacer un acteur">
					<informations_gographiques>
						<location_id />
						<supply_point_id vellum:comment="Get the case id of the supply point which is the supply_point_id of the location where the user is." />
						<location_type />
						<location_type_name />
						<pays_virtuel />
						<central_code />
						<central_id />
						<central_nom />
						<central_numero />
						<region_id />
						<region_nom />
						<district_id />
						<district_nom />
						<csi_id />
						<csi_nom />
					</informations_gographiques>
					<select_worker>
						<selection_acteurs />
						<number_of_workers />
						<repeat jr:template="">
							<position />
							<travailleur_id />
							<travailleur_nom_complet />
							<question1 />
							<ce_travailleur_a_dj_t_affect_tes-vous_sr_de_vouloir_le_raffecter />
							<display>
								<travailleur_nin_id />
								<travailleur_date_naissance />
								<travailleur_nom_complet />
								<travailleur_telephone_mm />
								<travailleur_infos />
								<relocation_request />
								<relocate_travailleur_code />
								<case_management>
									<relocate_worker_case>
										<update_worker_case vellum:case_type="travailleur_nouveau" vellum:role="SaveToCase">
											<case xmlns="http://commcarehq.org/case/transaction/v2" case_id="" date_modified="" user_id="">
												<update>
													<owner_id />
													<region_code_final />
													<district_code_final />
													<csi_code_final />
													<relocation_request />
													<relocate_travailleur_code />
													<niveau_final />
													<owner_id_final />
													<original_owner_id />
												</update>
											</case>
										</update_worker_case>
									</relocate_worker_case>
								</case_management>
							</display>
						</repeat>
						<join_travailleur_infos />
					</select_worker>
					<select_the_location>
						<niveau_de_rattachement />
						<region />
						<district />
						<csi />
						<region_nom_final />
						<region_code_final />
						<district_nom_final />
						<district_code_final />
						<csi_code_final />
						<csi_nom_final />
						<owner_id_final />
						<owner_id_final_nom />
						<niveau_final />
						<fosa_code_final />
						<relocate_to_same_location />
					</select_the_location>
					<resume>
						<locations_infos />
					</resume>
					<confirm_form_usage />
				</data>
			</instance>
			<instance src="jr://instance/session" id="commcaresession" />
			<instance src="jr://fixture/locations" id="locations" />
			<instance src="jr://instance/casedb" id="casedb" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques/location_id" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques/location_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques/supply_point_id" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques/supply_point_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/supply_point_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques/location_type" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques/location_type" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@type" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques/location_type_name" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques/location_type_name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/location_type" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques/pays_virtuel" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques/pays_virtuel" calculate="selected-at(instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_ids, 1)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques/central_code" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques/central_code" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@central_id]/site_code" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques/central_id" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques/central_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@central_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques/central_nom" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques/central_nom" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@central_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques/central_numero" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques/central_numero" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@central_id]/external_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques/region_id" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques/region_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@region_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques/region_nom" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques/region_nom" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@region_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques/district_id" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques/district_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@district_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques/district_nom" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques/district_nom" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@district_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques/csi_id" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques/csi_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@csi_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_gographiques/csi_nom" nodeset="/data/informations_gographiques/csi_nom" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@csi_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/select_worker" nodeset="/data/select_worker" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/select_worker/selection_acteurs" nodeset="/data/select_worker/selection_acteurs" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/select_worker/number_of_workers" nodeset="/data/select_worker/number_of_workers" vellum:calculate="count-selected(#form/select_worker/selection_acteurs)" calculate="count-selected(/data/select_worker/selection_acteurs)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/select_worker/repeat" nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/select_worker/repeat/position" nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/position" calculate="position(..)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/select_worker/repeat/travailleur_id" nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/travailleur_id" vellum:calculate="cond((#form/select_worker/repeat/position + 1) <= #form/select_worker/number_of_workers, selected-at(#form/select_worker/selection_acteurs, #form/select_worker/repeat/position), '')" calculate="cond((/data/select_worker/repeat/position + 1) <= /data/select_worker/number_of_workers, selected-at(/data/select_worker/selection_acteurs, /data/select_worker/repeat/position), '')" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/select_worker/repeat/travailleur_nom_complet" nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/travailleur_nom_complet" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_nouveau'][@status = 'open'][@case_id = current()/../travailleur_id]/case_name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/select_worker/repeat/question1" nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/question1" constraint="1 = 2" vellum:relevant="#form/select_worker/repeat/ce_travailleur_a_dj_t_affect_tes-vous_sr_de_vouloir_le_raffecter = 'non'" relevant="/data/select_worker/repeat/ce_travailleur_a_dj_t_affect_tes-vous_sr_de_vouloir_le_raffecter = 'non'" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/select_worker/repeat/ce_travailleur_a_dj_t_affect_tes-vous_sr_de_vouloir_le_raffecter" nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/ce_travailleur_a_dj_t_affect_tes-vous_sr_de_vouloir_le_raffecter" relevant="count(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][index/parent = current()/../travailleur_id][@status = 'open']) > 0" required="true()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/select_worker/repeat/display" nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/display" vellum:relevant="#form/select_worker/repeat/position + 1 <= #form/select_worker/number_of_workers" relevant="/data/select_worker/repeat/position + 1 <= /data/select_worker/number_of_workers" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/select_worker/repeat/display/travailleur_nin_id" nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/travailleur_nin_id" vellum:calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_nouveau'][@status = 'open'][@case_id = #form/select_worker/repeat/travailleur_id]/nin" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_nouveau'][@status = 'open'][@case_id = /data/select_worker/repeat/travailleur_id]/nin" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/select_worker/repeat/display/travailleur_date_naissance" nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/travailleur_date_naissance" vellum:calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_nouveau'][@status = 'open'][@case_id = #form/select_worker/repeat/travailleur_id]/date_de_naissance" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_nouveau'][@status = 'open'][@case_id = /data/select_worker/repeat/travailleur_id]/date_de_naissance" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/select_worker/repeat/display/travailleur_nom_complet" nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/travailleur_nom_complet" vellum:calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_nouveau'][@status = 'open'][@case_id = #form/select_worker/repeat/travailleur_id]/case_name" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_nouveau'][@status = 'open'][@case_id = /data/select_worker/repeat/travailleur_id]/case_name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/select_worker/repeat/display/travailleur_telephone_mm" nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/travailleur_telephone_mm" vellum:calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_nouveau'][@status = 'open'][@case_id = #form/select_worker/repeat/travailleur_id]/@external_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_nouveau'][@status = 'open'][@case_id = /data/select_worker/repeat/travailleur_id]/@external_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/select_worker/repeat/display/travailleur_infos" nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/travailleur_infos" vellum:calculate="concat("|", #form/select_worker/repeat/display/travailleur_nom_complet, "|", #form/select_worker/repeat/display/travailleur_telephone_mm, "|", #form/select_worker/repeat/display/travailleur_nin_id, "|", "
")" calculate="concat("|", /data/select_worker/repeat/display/travailleur_nom_complet, "|", /data/select_worker/repeat/display/travailleur_telephone_mm, "|", /data/select_worker/repeat/display/travailleur_nin_id, "|", "
")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/select_worker/repeat/display/relocation_request" nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/relocation_request" calculate=""pending"" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/select_worker/repeat/display/relocate_travailleur_code" nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/relocate_travailleur_code" vellum:calculate="if(#form/informations_gographiques/location_type = 'sci', #form/select_the_location/fosa_code_final, #form/select_the_location/district_code_final)" calculate="if(/data/informations_gographiques/location_type = 'sci', /data/select_the_location/fosa_code_final, /data/select_the_location/district_code_final)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/select_worker/repeat/display/case_management" nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/case_management" vellum:relevant="#form/confirm_form_usage = 'oui'" relevant="/data/confirm_form_usage = 'oui'" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/select_worker/repeat/display/case_management/relocate_worker_case" nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/case_management/relocate_worker_case" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/case_management/relocate_worker_case/update_worker_case/case/update/owner_id" vellum:calculate="#form/informations_gographiques/central_id" calculate="/data/informations_gographiques/central_id" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/case_management/relocate_worker_case/update_worker_case/case/update/region_code_final" vellum:calculate="#form/select_the_location/region_code_final" calculate="/data/select_the_location/region_code_final" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/case_management/relocate_worker_case/update_worker_case/case/update/district_code_final" vellum:calculate="#form/select_the_location/district_code_final" calculate="/data/select_the_location/district_code_final" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/case_management/relocate_worker_case/update_worker_case/case/update/csi_code_final" vellum:calculate="#form/select_the_location/csi_code_final" calculate="/data/select_the_location/csi_code_final" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/case_management/relocate_worker_case/update_worker_case/case/update/relocation_request" vellum:calculate="#form/select_worker/repeat/display/relocation_request" calculate="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/relocation_request" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/case_management/relocate_worker_case/update_worker_case/case/update/relocate_travailleur_code" vellum:calculate="#form/select_worker/repeat/display/relocate_travailleur_code" calculate="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/relocate_travailleur_code" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/case_management/relocate_worker_case/update_worker_case/case/update/niveau_final" vellum:calculate="#form/select_the_location/niveau_final" calculate="/data/select_the_location/niveau_final" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/case_management/relocate_worker_case/update_worker_case/case/update/owner_id_final" vellum:calculate="#form/select_the_location/owner_id_final" calculate="/data/select_the_location/owner_id_final" />

			<bind nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/case_management/relocate_worker_case/update_worker_case/case/@date_modified" calculate="/data/meta/timeEnd" type="xsd:dateTime" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/case_management/relocate_worker_case/update_worker_case/case/@user_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/case_management/relocate_worker_case/update_worker_case/case/@case_id" vellum:calculate="#form/select_worker/repeat/travailleur_id" calculate="/data/select_worker/repeat/travailleur_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/select_worker/join_travailleur_infos" nodeset="/data/select_worker/join_travailleur_infos" vellum:calculate="join(' ', #form/select_worker/repeat/display/travailleur_infos)" calculate="join(' ', /data/select_worker/repeat/display/travailleur_infos)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/select_the_location" nodeset="/data/select_the_location" />

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/select_the_location/region_code_final" nodeset="/data/select_the_location/region_code_final" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/select_the_location/region]/site_code" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/select_the_location/region]/site_code" />

	<h:body>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/informations_gographiques" ref="/data/informations_gographiques" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('informations_gographiques-label')" />
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/select_worker" ref="/data/select_worker" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('select_worker-label')" />
			<select vellum:ref="#form/select_worker/selection_acteurs" ref="/data/select_worker/selection_acteurs" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('select_worker/selection_acteurs-label')" />
				<itemset nodeset="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_nouveau'][@status = 'open'][@owner_id = /data/informations_gographiques/location_id]" vellum:nodeset="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_nouveau'][@status = 'open'][@owner_id = #form/informations_gographiques/location_id]">
					<label ref="nom_unique" />
					<value ref="@case_id" />
					<sort ref="nom_unique" />
				</itemset>
			</select>
			<group>
				<repeat vellum:jr__count="#form/select_worker/number_of_workers" jr:count="/data/select_worker/number_of_workers" jr:noAddRemove="true()" vellum:nodeset="#form/select_worker/repeat" nodeset="/data/select_worker/repeat">
					<trigger vellum:ref="#form/select_worker/repeat/question1" ref="/data/select_worker/repeat/question1" appearance="minimal">
						<label ref="jr:itext('select_worker/repeat/question1-label')" />
					</trigger>
					<select1 vellum:ref="#form/select_worker/repeat/ce_travailleur_a_dj_t_affect_tes-vous_sr_de_vouloir_le_raffecter" ref="/data/select_worker/repeat/ce_travailleur_a_dj_t_affect_tes-vous_sr_de_vouloir_le_raffecter">
						<label ref="jr:itext('select_worker/repeat/ce_travailleur_a_dj_t_affect_tes-vous_sr_de_vouloir_le_raffecter-label')" />
						<item>
							<label ref="jr:itext('select_worker/repeat/ce_travailleur_a_dj_t_affect_tes-vous_sr_de_vouloir_le_raffecter-oui-label')" />
							<value>oui</value>
						</item>
						<item>
							<label ref="jr:itext('select_worker/repeat/ce_travailleur_a_dj_t_affect_tes-vous_sr_de_vouloir_le_raffecter-non-label')" />
							<value>non</value>
						</item>
					</select1>
					<group vellum:ref="#form/select_worker/repeat/display" ref="/data/select_worker/repeat/display" appearance="field-list">
						<group vellum:ref="#form/select_worker/repeat/display/case_management" ref="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/case_management">
							<group vellum:ref="#form/select_worker/repeat/display/case_management/relocate_worker_case" ref="/data/select_worker/repeat/display/case_management/relocate_worker_case" />
						</group>
					</group>
				</repeat>
			</group>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/select_the_location" ref="/data/select_the_location" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('select_the_location-label')" />
			<select1 vellum:ref="#form/select_the_location/niveau_de_rattachement" ref="/data/select_the_location/niveau_de_rattachement">

			<select1 vellum:ref="#form/select_the_location/region" ref="/data/select_the_location/region" appearance="combobox">
				<label ref="jr:itext('select_the_location/region-label')" />
				<itemset nodeset="instance('locations')/locations/location[@type = "region"][@central_id = /data/informations_gographiques/central_id]" vellum:nodeset="instance('locations')/locations/location[@type = "region"][@central_id = #form/informations_gographiques/central_id]">
					<label ref="name" />
					<value ref="@id" />
					<sort ref="name" />
				</itemset>
			</select1>
			<select1 vellum:ref="#form/select_the_location/district" ref="/data/select_the_location/district" appearance="combobox">
				<label ref="jr:itext('select_the_location/district-label')" />
				<itemset nodeset="instance('locations')/locations/location[@type = "district"][@region_id = /data/select_the_location/region]" vellum:nodeset="instance('locations')/locations/location[@type = "district"][@region_id = #form/select_the_location/region]">
					<label ref="name" />
					<value ref="@id" />
					<sort ref="name" />
				</itemset>
			</select1>
			<select1 vellum:ref="#form/select_the_location/csi" ref="/data/select_the_location/csi" appearance="combobox">
				<label ref="jr:itext('select_the_location/csi-label')" />
				<itemset nodeset="instance('locations')/locations/location[@type = "csi"][@district_id = /data/select_the_location/district]" vellum:nodeset="instance('locations')/locations/location[@type = "csi"][@district_id = #form/select_the_location/district]">
					<label ref="name" />
					<value ref="@id" />
					<sort ref="name" />
				</itemset>
			</select1>
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/select_the_location/relocate_to_same_location" ref="/data/select_the_location/relocate_to_same_location" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('select_the_location/relocate_to_same_location-label')" />
			</trigger>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/resume" ref="/data/resume" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('resume-label')" />
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/resume/locations_infos" ref="/data/resume/locations_infos" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('resume/locations_infos-label')" />
			</trigger>
		</group>
		<select1 vellum:ref="#form/confirm_form_usage" ref="/data/confirm_form_usage">
			<label ref="jr:itext('confirm_form_usage-label')" />
			<item>
				<label ref="jr:itext('confirm_form_usage-oui-label')" />
				<value>oui</value>
			</item>
			<item>
				<label ref="jr:itext('confirm_form_usage-non-label')" />
				<value>non</value>
			</item>
		</select1>
	</h:body>
</h:html>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum">
	<h:head>
		<h:title>Synthèse des affectations</h:title>
		<model>
			<instance>
				<data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/0A8925BB-2874-49F7-9A81-714C1F4ECB42" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="Synthèse des affectations">
					<location_information>
						<location_id />
						<location_code />
						<location_type />
						<location_nom />
						<pays_id />
						<pays_code />
						<pays_nom />
						<region_id />
						<region_nom />
						<region_code />
						<district_id />
						<district_code />
						<district_nom />
						<csi_id />
						<csi_code />
						<csi_nom />
						<id_utilisateur />
						<validation_case_owner_id vellum:comment="Fall all levels, except FOSA, the person who submits the attendances is at the same level as the approvers" />
					</location_information>
					<campagne_id />
					<worker_category />
					<question26 ids="" count="" current_index="" vellum:role="Repeat">
						<item id="" index="" jr:template="">
							<categorie_code />
							<location_type />
							<display>
								<categorie_name />
								<categorie_validated />
								<nbr_affectation />
								<role_categorie_name_nbr_nbr_affectation />
							</display>
						</item>
					</question26>
				</data>
			</instance>
			<instance src="jr://instance/session" id="commcaresession" />
			<instance src="jr://fixture/locations" id="locations" />
			<instance src="jr://instance/casedb" id="casedb" />
			<instance src="jr://fixture/item-list:campagnes_label" id="campagnes_label" />
			<instance src="jr://fixture/item-list:categorie_by_location" id="categorie_by_location" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information" nodeset="/data/location_information" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/location_id" nodeset="/data/location_information/location_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/location_code" nodeset="/data/location_information/location_code" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/location_information/location_id]/site_code" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/location_information/location_id]/site_code" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/location_type" nodeset="/data/location_information/location_type" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/location_information/location_id]/@type" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/location_information/location_id]/@type" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/location_nom" nodeset="/data/location_information/location_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/location_information/location_id]/name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/location_information/location_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/pays_id" nodeset="/data/location_information/pays_id" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/location_information/location_id]/@central_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/location_information/location_id]/@central_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/pays_code" nodeset="/data/location_information/pays_code" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/location_information/pays_id]/site_code" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/location_information/pays_id]/site_code" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/pays_nom" nodeset="/data/location_information/pays_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/location_information/pays_id]/name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/location_information/pays_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/region_id" nodeset="/data/location_information/region_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@region_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/region_nom" nodeset="/data/location_information/region_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/location_information/region_id]/name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/location_information/region_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/region_code" nodeset="/data/location_information/region_code" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/location_information/region_id]/site_code" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/location_information/region_id]/site_code" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/district_id" nodeset="/data/location_information/district_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@district_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/district_code" nodeset="/data/location_information/district_code" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/location_information/district_id]/site_code" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/location_information/district_id]/site_code" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/district_nom" nodeset="/data/location_information/district_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/location_information/district_id]/name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/location_information/district_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/csi_id" nodeset="/data/location_information/csi_id" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/location_information/location_id]/@csi_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/location_information/location_id]/@csi_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/csi_code" nodeset="/data/location_information/csi_code" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/location_information/csi_id]/site_code" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/location_information/csi_id]/site_code" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/csi_nom" nodeset="/data/location_information/csi_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/location_information/csi_id]/name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/location_information/csi_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/id_utilisateur" nodeset="/data/location_information/id_utilisateur" vellum:calculate="#user/username" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/username" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/validation_case_owner_id" nodeset="/data/location_information/validation_case_owner_id" vellum:calculate="#form/location_information/location_id" calculate="/data/location_information/location_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/campagne_id" nodeset="/data/campagne_id" required="true()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/worker_category" nodeset="/data/worker_category" vellum:relevant="#form/campagne_id != '' and 1 = 2" relevant="/data/campagne_id != '' and 1 = 2" required="true()" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/question26/@current_index" vellum:calculate="count(#form/question26/item)" calculate="count(/data/question26/item)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/question26/item" nodeset="/data/question26/item" vellum:relevant="#form/campagne_id != ''" relevant="/data/campagne_id != ''" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/question26/item/categorie_code" nodeset="/data/question26/item/categorie_code" calculate="../@id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/question26/item/location_type" nodeset="/data/question26/item/location_type" calculate="instance('categorie_by_location')/categorie_by_location_list/categorie_by_location[categorie_code = current()/../categorie_code]/location_type" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/question26/item/display" nodeset="/data/question26/item/display" vellum:relevant="#form/question26/item/location_type = #form/location_information/location_type" relevant="/data/question26/item/location_type = /data/location_information/location_type" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/question26/item/display/categorie_name" nodeset="/data/question26/item/display/categorie_name" calculate="instance('categorie_by_location')/categorie_by_location_list/categorie_by_location[categorie_code = current()/../../categorie_code]/categorie_name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/question26/item/display/categorie_validated" nodeset="/data/question26/item/display/categorie_validated" vellum:calculate="count(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][@status = 'open'][campagne_id = #form/campagne_id][@category = 'validated'][travailleur_role = current()/../../categorie_code])" calculate="count(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][@status = 'open'][campagne_id = /data/campagne_id][@category = 'validated'][travailleur_role = current()/../../categorie_code])" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/question26/item/display/nbr_affectation" nodeset="/data/question26/item/display/nbr_affectation" vellum:calculate="count(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][@status = 'open'][campagne_id = #form/campagne_id][travailleur_role = current()/../../categorie_code])" calculate="count(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][@status = 'open'][campagne_id = /data/campagne_id][travailleur_role = current()/../../categorie_code])" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/question26/item/display/role_categorie_name_nbr_nbr_affectation" nodeset="/data/question26/item/display/role_categorie_name_nbr_nbr_affectation" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/question26/@ids" value="join(' ', instance('categorie_by_location')/categorie_by_location_list/categorie_by_location/categorie_code)" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/question26/@count" value="count-selected(/data/question26/@ids)" />
			<setvalue event="jr-insert" ref="/data/question26/item/@index" value="int(/data/question26/@current_index)" />
			<setvalue event="jr-insert" ref="/data/question26/item/@id" value="selected-at(/data/question26/@ids, ../@index)" />
			<itext>
				<translation lang="fra" default="">
					<text id="location_information-label">
						<value>Information de Lieu</value>
					</text>
					<text id="campagne_id-label">
						<value>Sélectionner la campagne:</value>
					</text>
					<text id="worker_category-label">
						<value>Catégorie des travailleurs</value>
					</text>
					<text id="question26/item/display/role_categorie_name_nbr_nbr_affectation-label">
						<value>### État des affectations
|Rôle| Demande|Validé(s)|
|:----:|:----:|:----:|
|<output value="/data/question26/item/display/categorie_name" vellum:value="#form/question26/item/display/categorie_name" />| <output value="/data/question26/item/display/nbr_affectation" vellum:value="#form/question26/item/display/nbr_affectation" />|<output value="/data/question26/item/display/categorie_validated" vellum:value="#form/question26/item/display/categorie_validated" />|  </value>
						<value form="markdown">### État des affectations
|Rôle| Demande|Validé(s)|
|:----:|:----:|:----:|
|<output value="/data/question26/item/display/categorie_name" vellum:value="#form/question26/item/display/categorie_name" />| <output value="/data/question26/item/display/nbr_affectation" vellum:value="#form/question26/item/display/nbr_affectation" />|<output value="/data/question26/item/display/categorie_validated" vellum:value="#form/question26/item/display/categorie_validated" />|  </value>
					</text>
				</translation>
				<translation lang="en">
					<text id="location_information-label">
						<value>Location Information</value>
					</text>
					<text id="campagne_id-label">
						<value>Select the campaign:</value>
					</text>
					<text id="worker_category-label">
						<value>Worker Category</value>
					</text>
					<text id="question26/item/display/role_categorie_name_nbr_nbr_affectation-label">
						<value>### État des affectations
|Rôle| Demande|Validé(s)|
|:----:|:----:|:----:|
|<output value="/data/question26/item/display/categorie_name" vellum:value="#form/question26/item/display/categorie_name" />| <output value="/data/question26/item/display/nbr_affectation" vellum:value="#form/question26/item/display/nbr_affectation" />|<output value="/data/question26/item/display/categorie_validated" vellum:value="#form/question26/item/display/categorie_validated" />|  </value>
						<value form="markdown">### État des affectations
|Rôle| Demande|Validé(s)|
|:----:|:----:|:----:|
|<output value="/data/question26/item/display/categorie_name" vellum:value="#form/question26/item/display/categorie_name" />| <output value="/data/question26/item/display/nbr_affectation" vellum:value="#form/question26/item/display/nbr_affectation" />|<output value="/data/question26/item/display/categorie_validated" vellum:value="#form/question26/item/display/categorie_validated" />|  </value>
					</text>
				</translation>
			</itext>
		</model>
		<vellum:hashtags>{"#user/username":null}</vellum:hashtags>
		<vellum:hashtagTransforms>{"prefixes":{"#user/":"instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/"}}</vellum:hashtagTransforms>
	</h:head>
	<h:body>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/location_information" ref="/data/location_information" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('location_information-label')" />
		</group>
		<select1 vellum:ref="#form/campagne_id" ref="/data/campagne_id">
			<label ref="jr:itext('campagne_id-label')" />
			<itemset nodeset="instance('campagnes_label')/campagnes_label_list/campagnes_label">
				<label ref="campagne_label" />
				<value ref="campagne_id" />
			</itemset>
		</select1>
		<select1 vellum:ref="#form/worker_category" ref="/data/worker_category">
			<label ref="jr:itext('worker_category-label')" />
			<itemset nodeset="instance('categorie_by_location')/categorie_by_location_list/categorie_by_location[location_type = /data/location_information/location_type]" vellum:nodeset="instance('categorie_by_location')/categorie_by_location_list/categorie_by_location[location_type = #form/location_information/location_type]">
				<label ref="categorie_name" />
				<value ref="categorie_code" />
				<sort ref="categorie_name" />
			</itemset>
		</select1>
		<group>
			<repeat jr:count="/data/question26/@count" jr:noAddRemove="true()" vellum:nodeset="#form/question26/item" nodeset="/data/question26/item">
				<group vellum:ref="#form/question26/item/display" ref="/data/question26/item/display">
					<trigger vellum:ref="#form/question26/item/display/role_categorie_name_nbr_nbr_affectation" ref="/data/question26/item/display/role_categorie_name_nbr_nbr_affectation" appearance="minimal">
						<label ref="jr:itext('question26/item/display/role_categorie_name_nbr_nbr_affectation-label')" />
					</trigger>
				</group>
			</repeat>
		</group>
	</h:body>
</h:html>
_attachments.e56c8b96a267491390b96202a56ef485.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum">
	<h:head>
		<h:title>Suppression d'affectation</h:title>
		<model>
			<instance>
				<data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/7168E732-459E-4756-8FB6-E73308B17434" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="Suppression d'affectation">
					<details_de_laffection_libelle__valeur__------ />
					<confirmation_suppression />
				</data>
			</instance>
			<instance src="jr://instance/casedb" id="casedb" />
			<instance src="jr://instance/session" id="commcaresession" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/details_de_laffection_libelle__valeur__------" nodeset="/data/details_de_laffection_libelle__valeur__------" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/confirmation_suppression" nodeset="/data/confirmation_suppression" constraint=". = 'oui'" jr:constraintMsg="jr:itext('confirmation_suppression-constraintMsg')" />
			<itext>
				<translation lang="fra" default="">
					<text id="details_de_laffection_libelle__valeur__-------label">
						<value>## Details de l'affection

|Libelle | Valeur |
|:---:|:---|
| Nom | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/index/parent]/case_name" vellum:value="#case/parent/case_name" /> |
| Telephone |  <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/index/parent]/telephone_mm" vellum:value="#case/parent/telephone_mm" /> |
| Fonction |  <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/index/parent]/fonction" vellum:value="#case/parent/fonction" />  |
| Role|  <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/travailleur_role_nom" vellum:value="#case/travailleur_role_nom" />  |</value>
						<value form="markdown">## Details de l'affection

|Libelle | Valeur |
|:---:|:---|
| Nom | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/index/parent]/case_name" vellum:value="#case/parent/case_name" /> |
| Telephone |  <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/index/parent]/telephone_mm" vellum:value="#case/parent/telephone_mm" /> |
| Fonction |  <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/index/parent]/fonction" vellum:value="#case/parent/fonction" />  |
| Role|  <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/travailleur_role_nom" vellum:value="#case/travailleur_role_nom" />  |</value>
					</text>
					<text id="confirmation_suppression-label">
						<value>## ⚠️ Confirmation de suppression

Êtes-vous sûr(e) de vouloir **supprimer cette affectation ** ?  
> Cette action est **irréversible** et toutes les informations associées à cette séance seront définitivement perdues.</value>
						<value form="markdown">## ⚠️ Confirmation de suppression

Êtes-vous sûr(e) de vouloir **supprimer cette affectation ** ?  
> Cette action est **irréversible** et toutes les informations associées à cette séance seront définitivement perdues.</value>
					</text>
					<text id="confirmation_suppression-constraintMsg">
						<value>Merci de retourner à la question précédent</value>
					</text>
					<text id="confirmation_suppression-oui-label">
						<value>### ✅ Oui, je confirme la suppression  </value>
						<value form="markdown">### ✅ Oui, je confirme la suppression  </value>
					</text>
					<text id="confirmation_suppression-non-label">
						<value>### ❌ Non, annuler</value>
